programme.title: My Cat from Hell

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: The Browns start building their home on their remote land in Alaska. Billy and his four sons venture out to pick up some much-needed lumber and on the way learn of a huge storm coming their way. The Browns must batten down the hatches and take cover, while hoping that their lumber doesn't fall victim to the chaos that large storms create

programme.title: My Cat from Hell

programme.title: My Cat from Hell

programme.title: Lone Star Law

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.sub-title: The Rogue Team Rises - Part Two

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue

programme.desc: Investigators from the Houston SPCA are called to a remote property, where they find five horses - one dead and four in poor health

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Agents recall memorable cases, including the seizure of more than 30 poodles, 200 chickens being kept in inhumane temperatures exceeding 100 degrees and a house overrun by 50 rabbits

programme.title: Reframed: Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: In the final part of the series, Marilyn triumphs in her most celebrated comedy yet, Some Like It Hot. In the weeks before her death, she is on the cusp of a new and exciting future, making front pages with her portraits, and securing a triumphant new deal with 20th Century Fox. Narrated by Jessica Chastain

programme.title: Being Stanley Baxter
programme.desc: A profile of the Glasgow-born actor, comedian and impressionist, who died in December 2025 at the age of 99, charting his extraordinary professional journey and personal life by drawing on rare archive footage and candid interviews. The film reflects the complex aspects of his long and distinguished life as well as celebrating his comedic genius, particularly his impressionist and satirical work

programme.title: Only Connect
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell hosts the first semi-final of the quiz requiring patience and lateral thinking, with the Crossworders taking on the Science Writers for a place in the final

programme.title: Art That Made Us
programme.desc: How the generation of artists who recorded the shocks of global war gave way in the 1950s and 1960s to an explosion of new voices from across the British Isles, reinventing the arts and creating a richer, more diverse culture. Young artists rebelled against the old establishment, kicking against the confines of class, sex, nation and race

programme.title: University Challenge
programme.desc: The final first-round match of the academic quiz sees Robert Gordon University return to the competition for the first time in 28 years as their team takes on the University of Roehampton, making their debut on the show. Jeremy Paxman asks the questions

programme.title: Only Connect
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell hosts the second semi-final, in which the Bankers face the Lapsed Psychologists for a place in the grand finale

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Daddy dresses up in a spaceman suit and goes on the rampage in the toy department of a local shop, forcing an embarrassed Hyacinth to intervene. Suburban comedy, starring Patricia Routledge and Clive Swift

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy gets out of his depth when helping arrange Frank's wedding. The night before the event, he meets bridesmaid Liz

programme.title: A History of Britain by Simon Schama
programme.desc: Simon Schama continues his narrative with a look at why Britain proved immune to the ideals of the French Revolution, ignoring the call of liberty, equality and fraternity so readily embraced by the peasantry of France. Instead, the influence of poets, painters and journalists of the Romantic movement persuaded the nation of the primacy of feeling over reason, and divided opinion on the civil strife across the Channel

programme.title: Reframed: Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Documentary examining the life of the iconic actress. In part one, aspiring star Norma Jeane attends an audition at 20th Century Fox, where the head of casting suggests she change her name to Marilyn Monroe. After connecting with Joseph Schenck, Marilyn is able to get a job at Columbia Pictures, where she receives her first starring role. Narrated by Jessica Chastain

programme.title: Reframed: Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Marilyn's rise is nearly ruined when news breaks that she posed nude for a calendar earlier in her career. She uses this to her advantage to showcase her body confidence. Monroe also demonstrates her unique talent for comedy in Gentlemen Prefer Blondes, and reaches superstar status

programme.title: Reframed: Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Marilyn is forging a new identity for herself in New York, but when news breaks that she plans to create her own production company, Darryl Zanuck refuses to let her out of her contract. Narrated by Jessica Chastain

programme.title: From Ice to Fire: The Incredible Science of Temperature
programme.desc: Helen Czerski explores the science of heat and how the ability to harness it has led to some of humanity's greatest innovations, from steam engines to plasmas. She also reveals how heat is the hidden energy contained within matter, with the power to transform it from one state to another

programme.title: Only Connect
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell hosts the second semi-final, in which the Bankers face the Lapsed Psychologists for a place in the grand finale

programme.title: India: Nature's Wonderland
programme.desc: Part two of two. Wildlife expert Liz Bonnin, Slumdog Millionaire actress Freida Pinto and mountaineer Jon Gupta explore the natural world in India, including a village of birds, masks that come alive, an impressive mountain range and baby turtles erupting out of the sand

programme.title: University Challenge
programme.desc: Jeremy Paxman asks the questions in the first of the highest-scoring loser matches, as two teams of students get a second opportunity to earn a place in the next stage of the competition

programme.title: Only Connect
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell presents the final of the quiz show of patience and lateral thinking, where successful contestants make connections between things which at first do not appear to be linked. The Crossworders battle the Lapsed Pyschologists to be crowned series victors

programme.title: From Ice to Fire: The Incredible Science of Temperature
programme.desc: Helen Czerski explores the science of heat and how the ability to harness it has led to some of humanity's greatest innovations, from steam engines to plasmas. She also reveals how heat is the hidden energy contained within matter, with the power to transform it from one state to another

programme.title: Murder on the Victorian Railway
programme.desc: Drama-documentary examining the death of banker Thomas Briggs in July 1864, which was the first murder to be committed on a British train. The film uses testimonies from court transcripts, memoirs, letters and newspaper reports to tell the story of the crime through those connected to it, including engine driver Alfred Ekin - who found the body - and Richard Tanner, the detective in charge of the investigation. It also explores the huge public outcry and debate it provoked. Narrated by Toby Jones

programme.title: A Very Peculiar Practice
programme.desc: Stephen wins the confidence of the notorious Professor John Furie - until a combination of drink and drugs drives his patient into murderous paranoia. Peter Davison and Timothy West star

programme.title: A Very Peculiar Practice
programme.desc: Bob Buzzard tests a pharmaceutical company's new wonder drug on all his patients, causing a rash of bizarre side-effects around the campus. David Troughton and Peter Davison star in the surreal university drama

programme.title: Timeshift
programme.sub-title: How to Write a Mills & Boon
programme.desc: Author Stella Duffy sets out to produce her own novel for Mills & Boon, the company that has become one of the biggest names in romantic fiction. She enlists the help of some avid fans in a challenging mission that takes her from London to Italy and offers an insight into the joy and frustration of writing

programme.title: Only Connect
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell presents the final of the quiz show of patience and lateral thinking, where successful contestants make connections between things which at first do not appear to be linked. The Crossworders battle the Lapsed Pyschologists to be crowned series victors

programme.title: Murder on the Victorian Railway
programme.desc: Drama-documentary examining the death of banker Thomas Briggs in July 1864, which was the first murder to be committed on a British train. The film uses testimonies from court transcripts, memoirs, letters and newspaper reports to tell the story of the crime through those connected to it, including engine driver Alfred Ekin - who found the body - and Richard Tanner, the detective in charge of the investigation. It also explores the huge public outcry and debate it provoked. Narrated by Toby Jones

programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical discussion and expert advice for viewers

programme.title: Rip Off Britain
programme.desc: Louise Minchin, Julia Somerville and Gloria Hunniford hear the story of an Edinburgh woman left devastated when an online romance turned out to be a scam

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Two dog-loving developers tackle epic projects in Wales and Norfolk. A seasoned developer is looking to move quickly and economically in Nottingham. Presented by Martin Roberts, Dion Dublin and Jacqui Joseph

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: As part of Carers Matter Week, Eric Knowles presents a special episode to celebrate the millions of people who dedicate their lives to helping others. In Newark, Nottinghamshire, Nick Hall and Izzie Balmer help two teams of carers - twin sisters Kayley and Sarah, who both have children with autism and ADHD, and charity worker Mandy and her daughter Jo, whose son has a rare chromosome disorder, similar to cerebral palsy

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Natalie Cassidy: Caring Together
programme.desc: Natalie learns about childhood illnesses, meeting up with a friend who talks about her experiences of having a child with cancer and the support her family received from the nursing teams. Natalie then goes on to join a community nursing team, shadowing nurse Charlotte across clinics and home visits, while also facing up to her personal fear of needles

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson is joined by his uncle Matheson as the pair head to the Scottish Borders for a weekend in the outdoors to relax and reset. On their way to their favourite fishing spot in Coldingham, they have a go at hedge laying before Matheson relives his youth riding horses on the beach

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a couple find their first home together in Oxfordshire, with space for a rabbit palace and their impressive collection of house plants. He also visits the University of Oxford Botanic Garden, where he discovers how nature is inspiring exciting new technological developments

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Florence Headlam and Joe Swift are in Stockport to help Sasha and Rick transform their long, muddy, unloved garden into a wild English wonderland. With unsafe concrete steps making the patio hard to access, it's no place for daughter Jocelyn or the new baby on the way, and hosting friends and family is a real challenge. The couple dream of a vibrant, wildlife-friendly space, paired with a practical patio. Can the team deliver everything they want on a £4,000 budget?

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Friends and family Lynne, Derek, John and Kenny compete for cash by crossing a bridge of stepping stones across the studio floor. Quiz show, hosted by Ross Kemp

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Rose Matafeo on the quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious answers to questions

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Roman Kemp present another mix of nationwide reports and live studio-based chat

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Grant steps up to protect his family, Zack purposely raises suspicions, while Eddie and Harry clash

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.desc: The quarter-final sees the teams heading to the literary town of Hay-on-Wye in Wales, where they work in pairs to transform two high street shops. One sells guitars, the other arts and crafts, and the aim of the designers is to improve layout and visual merchandising to entice more customers. Alan follows their progress, while Michelle Ogundehin is joined by retail expert Ross Bailey to assess the final results

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Eight famous faces explore their family history, beginning with broadcaster Zoe Ball. With the help of her father, broadcasting favourite Johnny Ball, she uncovers an unexpected connection to Scotland and a tale of hardship and resilience that took the family from industrial 19th-century Glasgow to Bolton. On her late mother's side she hears a tale of mental illness and more migration, as she follows in her ancestors' footsteps from Cornwall to the North East

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of today's headlines

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Niall and Ava face major life changes as Ruben struggles with his relationship. An impulsive choice between Mona and Niall has serious consequences for all involved. Hard-hitting drama, written by and starring Richard Gadd, with Jamie Bell, Amy Manson and Anjli Mohindra

programme.title: The Photograph (2020)
programme.desc: Michael, a reporter, becomes fascinated by a picture of a woman, and wants to know her backstory. In the present day, following the death of her estranged mother, a devastated young woman finds a photo that will change her life forever. Writer/director Stella Meghie's drama, starring Issa Rae, LaKeith Stanfield and Chelsea Peretti

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Connor becomes increasingly anxious about his brother's disappearance and begs Pip to help him find Jamie. Despite her reluctance, she eventually realises she has no choice and is adamant Max must be involved somehow. But when she seemingly hits a dead end, she is forced to go back to the drawing board and retrace Jamie's last steps

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Highlights from series 19 of the comedy panel show hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by guests to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. With appearances by Lucy Beaumont, Bob Mortimer, Jamelia, John Kearns, Harriet Kemsley, Yinka Bokinni, Gyles Brandreth, Dianne Buswell, Mark Chapman, Montell Douglas, Tasha Ghouri, Julie Hesmondhalgh, Will Kirk, David Morrissey, Josh Pugh and Holly Willoughby

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international stories as they break

programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Rip Off Britain
programme.sub-title: Help! Is My Online Job a Scam?
programme.desc: The team help a viewer concerned that the online task work he has been completing might not be genuine. They also have an update on an undercover report into a dodgy spray-foam insulation firm, and how their footage helped put the man responsible behind bars

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts is overcome by the amount of beige on show in a Telford flat. Dion Dublin heads downwards to reveal an unexpected bonus in Leeds. In Suffolk, there are character features for Jacqui Joseph to uncover

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: David Fergus and Caroline Hawley guide the teams at an antiques centre in King's Lynn, Norfolk. Charlie Ross pays a visit to a barbershop museum

programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Natalie Cassidy: Caring Together
programme.desc: As Natalie juggles college and family life, she learns about teenage mental health, online pressures and autism - and how care reaches far beyond the classroom. She also realises she has been putting off her own coursework, and as she finally sits down to start it, she gains a better understanding of the pressures facing her teenage daughter Eliza

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: The Rev Richard Coles joins Robson to explore the Northumberland coastline, with the pair taking a Canadian canoe trip along the Coquet river and visiting the hidden gem of Warkworth's secret hermitage. They also make the crossing to Lindisfarne for a photography class and have a go at rope work

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps Micky, who wants to relocate from the busy seaside town of Hove in East Sussex to the quiet of the Somerset countryside. She wants a property with lots of land for her big, beloved rescue dog, so Jules lines up a selection of standout houses that might just fit the bill. The presenter also tries his hand at traditional screen printing when he visits a small studio specialising in designs inspired by nature

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Florence Headlam head to Shrewsbury to help James regenerate his plain garden into a Doctor Who-inspired space, complete with Tardis shed, futuristic planting, a circular pathway and a tranquil water feature. With the support of James's sister Maria, and Charlie and Florence's creativity, it isn't long before this ordinary garden is turned into somewhere extraordinary where sci-fi fan James can feel truly at home

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Family of four Anna, Gemma, Zoe and Andreas competes for cash by crossing a bridge of stepping stones across the studio floor. Quiz show, hosted by Ross Kemp

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Ria Lina

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Angellica Bell and JB Gill present the magazine show, with celebrity guests and stories of interest from around the UK

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: It is the day of Vicki and Ross's wedding, but it remains to be seen whether it goes ahead, and Priya gets a shock

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: The semi-finals kick off at the National Railway Museum in York, where the contestants cater for a banquet to celebrate the 200th anniversary of the birth of the modern railway. But fine-dining on this scale, for 100 guests, is beyond anything the amateurs have ever faced before - and to add to the pressure, the menu has been designed by judge Anna Haugh, who is running the service

programme.title: Amandaland
programme.desc: Amanda finds out a big house on her street is owned by an elderly lady who is planning to move out, so she inserts herself into her life, hoping to get first refusal on the sale. Lucy Punch stars, with a guest appearance by Pam Ferris

programme.title: Only Child
programme.desc: Ken forces Richard to accompany him to Aviemore so that he can help him navigate the QR code scanner at the train station ticket barrier. However, a mix-up on the platform turns what should be a simple day trip into an almighty fiasco

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of today's headlines

programme.title: Carl Frampton: On Probation
programme.desc: Carl visits an amateur MMA fighter on probation whose sporting dreams have been put on ice after a historic conviction for assault against a former partner has resurfaced. Carl also meets a man who is getting his forklift licence - before he can even drive a car - and finds out how support from probation, and his peers, is helping him build a new life

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Emma Myers returns as teenage amateur sleuth Pip Fitz-Amobi. Pip is determined to stay away from any more investigations and focus on her friends, school and Ravi. But when a key witness in Max Hastings' trial disappears, Pip feels the pull of a new case. Adapted by Holly Jackson from her novel Good Girl Bad Blood, and co-starring Henry Ashton, Zain Iqbal and Jude Morgan-Collie

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: A panel of BBC journalists hosts round-up from Westminster, delivering the usual mix of serious analysis and light-hearted gossip about the biggest stories in politics

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents the high stakes celebrity quiz. Rugby player Joe Marler, actor Jennie McAlpine, comedian Geoff Norcott and presenter Jean Johannson must cross the Bridge by stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies, earning money for the charity of their choice with each correct answer

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: The case of an online catfishing abuse incident, which saw a 20-year-old suspect accused by a 12-year-old girl in Scotland. The suspect's bail conditions were supposed to prevent him from accessing the internet, but he very quickly was the subject of a second accusation from New Zealand, with online activity traced back to his house

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: Police re-arrest Alexander McCartney after discovering thousands of images of child abuse on his electronic devices and a multi-agency international investigation begins when the US Department of Homeland Security learn of two more catfishing victims. With McCartney due in court to plead guilty to charges of making indecent images of children and blackmail, the case takes a turn when an obituary page for one of his victims is found

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy's recovery is back on track after he and John put his hand to the test. The pair are training again, and the search for Tommy's next opponent begins. Eager to make the most of family time, Tommy splashes out on a £90,000 motor home for family trips with Molly and Bambi and takes his mother out for lunch and a long-overdue catch-up. Tommy reveals that John has had a recent health scare, so to cheer him up, father and son take their very different caravans to a local steam fair

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy realises just how far he and Molly have come since the separation, but John's worries grow as Tommy takes on a 100km triathlon, pushing his body to new physical limits. Before the challenge, Tommy takes some downtime at the spa with his mates, preparing for a huge press push ahead of his series premiere. After completing a series of intense physical challenges, he has to deal with a social media backlash

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy receives news of the untimely death of boxing legend Ricky Hatton, which reminds him to live life to its fullest. He then sets out on the most gruelling test of endurance possible - climbing the three highest mountains in England, Scotland and Wales in just 24 hours. At Halloween, Tommy and John go pumpkin picking with Bambi, things are back on track with Molly, and the house renovation is almost completed

programme.title: Hunting the Rolex Rippers
programme.desc: The search for the gang of thieves known for stalking celebrities on social media and targeting those with expensive watches. Journalist Tir Dhondy gets access, for the first time ever, to the gang members behind the crime. She meets the teenage moped riders snatching watches off the street, as well as a gang leader who runs a team of teenage watch rippers and female watch spotters. Tir also comes face-to-face with the 16-year-old who used a machete to steal singer Aled Jones' £17,000 Rolex in broad daylight

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Single, penniless poet Ruby has recently moved back home to live with her mother, Jen. When their strict Presbyterian neighbours descend on the home for her spoiled sister Eliza's engagement party, Ruby's only job is to not shame the family. Short, one-off comedy, starring Amy Molloy

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's news

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve is in search of one of the most spectacular events on earth - bait balls. These wildlife events are so epic that they can be seen from space - but they won't be easy to find

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall searches for deadly animals living in the capital of Suriname, from snakes in people's gardens to snail-catching kites and one of the deadliest snakes on earth

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.desc: After racing over 11,000km through Europe and Asia, the teams face one final test of endurance as they embark on the last leg of their journey to the finish line in Hatgal, Mongolia, where the first team to arrive will claim victory and a £20,000 prize

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.desc: Six months after returning home from the adventure of a lifetime, all five teams reunite for the very first time. Together, they look back on their extraordinary 12,000km journey from Palermo in Sicily to the remote wilderness of Hatgal in northern Mongolia, reliving the defining moments of a race that pushed them all to their limits. From the euphoric highs to the brutal setbacks, this celebration of their journey combines unseen footage with exclusive behind-the-scenes access

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: The film-maker reflects on 25 years of his documentaries, featuring brand new conversations between Louis and some of his most memorable contributors. In this first edition, he looks back at his earliest documentaries, and explores how some people's most fervent beliefs can bring them into conflict with mainstream society. Louis catches up with some of his previous contributors including Mike Cain, who he first met in the mid-90s, having moved to the hills of Idaho for what he saw as an inevitable war with the federal government

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: The film-maker revisits documentaries exploring the commodification of forbidden desires, taking in subjects ranging from the porn industry to the US opioid crisis. He is reunited with porn star JJ, who has turned his back on his old career to begin a new life in eastern Europe, and drug addict Katilia, who is still struggling to turn her life around

programme.title: Man Like Mobeen
programme.desc: Nida offers to get Mobeen a fake passport if he can steal something from the Turks. Will help from Uncle Shady and his big drill be enough to pull it off? Comedy, starring Guz Khan

programme.title: Man Like Mobeen
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the gang debates what to do with the stolen money. Jerry reveals his true colours, Emre investigates the theft, and Uncle Shady offers Mobeen a lifeline. Comedy, starring Guz Khan

programme.title: Man Like Mobeen
programme.desc: On a plane alone, Mobeen recounts how it all started, with his teenage memories of the first job he did for Khan and the beginning of his brotherhood with Nate and Eight. Comedy, starring Guz Khan

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: Police connect the suicide of a 12-year-old girl in West Virginia to Alexander McCartney, opening a manslaughter investigation but in order to charge him they have to prove he foresaw the risk to her life. The case sets a new legal precedent in the UK and more than five years after the investigation began, McCartney is finally convicted and sentenced

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: A man afflicted with chronic bad luck tries to reconnect with his dad after setting fire to the family home. Comedy short, starring Dylan Blore and Mark Bonnar

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Two emotionally unassembled young men start a play group, Funboys Fun Club, for childish young men to engage in some wholesome mucking about. When they come across severely depressed 60-year-old Marty, they try their best to bring some joy back to his life. Pilot for the sitcom, with Rian Lennon and Ryan Early

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: The film-maker reflects on 25 years of his documentaries, featuring brand new conversations between Louis and some of his most memorable contributors. In this first edition, he looks back at his earliest documentaries, and explores how some people's most fervent beliefs can bring them into conflict with mainstream society. Louis catches up with some of his previous contributors including Mike Cain, who he first met in the mid-90s, having moved to the hills of Idaho for what he saw as an inevitable war with the federal government

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge

programme.title: The Catch Up

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is in Zambia to witness the world's largest aerial migration. However, these 10 million fruit bats are nothing but food for the eagles of Africa

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is in Sydney, Australia, searching for the world's most venomous spider, the fastest striking snake, and an ocean dragon that's a camouflaged assassin

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.desc: The quarter-final sees the teams heading to the literary town of Hay-on-Wye in Wales, where they work in pairs to transform two high street shops. One sells guitars, the other arts and crafts, and the aim of the designers is to improve layout and visual merchandising to entice more customers. Alan follows their progress, while Michelle Ogundehin is joined by retail expert Ross Bailey to assess the final results

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Emma Myers returns as teenage amateur sleuth Pip Fitz-Amobi. Pip is determined to stay away from any more investigations and focus on her friends, school and Ravi. But when a key witness in Max Hastings' trial disappears, Pip feels the pull of a new case. Adapted by Holly Jackson from her novel Good Girl Bad Blood, and co-starring Henry Ashton, Zain Iqbal and Jude Morgan-Collie

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Connor becomes increasingly anxious about his brother's disappearance and begs Pip to help him find Jamie. Despite her reluctance, she eventually realises she has no choice and is adamant Max must be involved somehow. But when she seemingly hits a dead end, she is forced to go back to the drawing board and retrace Jamie's last steps

programme.title: Radio 1's Big Weekend
programme.desc: The best moments from the music event at Sunderland's Herrington Country Park, featuring headliners Fatboy Slim, Zara Larsson and Olivia Dean

programme.title: Man Like Mobeen
programme.desc: Sitcom about a reformed drug dealer trying to look after his younger sister, despite his murky past constantly catching up with him. programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Two burglars break into a house, where they come across a man already tied up. Comedy short, written by and starring Stephen Buchanan and Martin Quinn

programme.title: Radio 1's Big Weekend

programme.title: Man Like Mobeen

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: On a Bradford estate, Lenny and Mullet find an abandoned car and turn it into a DIY spaceship. Elif Riley, Logan Ludbrook, Lucy Francis and Hayley Brown star in this kitchen-sink sci-fi comedy about big dreams, everyday lives and escaping without going anywhere

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder

But when a key witness in Max Hastings' trial disappears, Pip feels the pull of a new case. programme.title: Iolo's River Valleys
programme.desc: Iolo Williams explores the Teifi, known as the queen of Welsh rivers. He heads upstream to the Teifi marshes and the old slate quarries near Cilgerran, where he finds a slow worm hunting in the open. He also meets Rod Bowen, a local coracleman, to learn about a 2,000-year-old fishing tradition. A major highlight occurs at Maes y Crugiau, where Iolo watches an otter as it hunts and eats an eel

programme.title: This Is a Bomb: The Nevada Casino Heist
programme.desc: When the bomb detonated inside Harvey's Wagon Wheel Casino, it left behind more than shattered concrete and twisted steel in the form of a maze of unanswered questions. However, a lucky break in the case led to a psychological stand-off where calculated risks unravelled, loyalties fractured, and the truth proved far more complicated than anyone imagined

programme.title: The Elon Musk Show
programme.sub-title: The Elon Musk Show: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Picking up where the 2022 series left off, this film tracks Elon Musk's takeover of Twitter, the seismic fallouts of his personal life and his evolution into a political figure on both side of the Atlantic. With immersive archive footage and revealing testimony from childhood friends, political insiders and former employees

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Ben Fogle presents an appeal on behalf of Hearing Dogs for Deaf People, a charity that provide support and trained assistance dogs to those living with deafness or hearing loss

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Family of four Melissa, Matt, Becky and Nick competes for cash by crossing the bridge of stepping stones across the studio floor. Quiz show, hosted by Ross Kemp

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets out on a trip across Belgium, starting his adventure by boarding the Eurostar at London's St Pancras International to travel to the Belgian capital Brussels. Once there, he visits the city's Theatre Royal, learning how an impassioned opera performance led to revolution on the streets and the birth of an independent nation

programme.title: Farm 999
programme.sub-title: Banned Blood Sport and Spontaneous Combustion on a Farm
programme.desc: Farmers and police in the East Yorkshire town of Goole join forces to tackle a cruel countryside crime, as rural crime officer Sam Blakebrough leads the pursuit of men accused of setting dogs on hares for sport. In Caernarfon, Gwynedd, a dairy farmer's harvest goes up in flames when a devastating case of spontaneous combustion destroys thousands of pounds worth of animal feed. Over in Winsford, Cheshire, reporter Paul Colgan trains with a specialist fire-and-rescue team to learn how they save large farm animals in life-or-death situations

programme.title: Lost and Found in the Lakes
programme.desc: The team dive deep to search for a precious tankard lost by a heartbroken son, and detectives Mui and Sam work together to try to solve the mystery of a drone found in Ullswater

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons hosts the quick-fire quiz in which six contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions

programme.desc: As preparations for the showcase continue, Tippy, Gus and Daisy attempt to help put Louis back on track, following the break-up of his marriage. Nic and Vic look to a spiritual ritual to help with their dreams of a child. Daisy is overjoyed when Griffin visits, but warns him against initiating a casual relationship with a besotted Gus. Drama, starring Carrie Green and Cohen Holloway

programme.title: Sicily: The Wonder of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Michael Scott concludes his history of Sicily, telling the story of how the Christian Byzantine Empire was swept aside by a Muslim Arab invasion from North Africa. The island was transformed by new trade networks and agricultural techniques, and in the 19th century was unified with Italy - but the greatest threat to their prosperity then came from within and the rise of the Mafia

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits Warwick Castle where cigarette cards, ancient Peruvian figures and a celebrated furniture-maker's working drawings are among the finds. Presented by Michael Aspel

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo's Belgian rail journey continues in the Dutch speaking region of Flanders. In Antwerp, he discovers the city's historic multi-billion-pound diamond industry and drops in at the workshop of an expert. Heading to Belgium's third city Ghent, he visits the cathedral and marvels at a 15th-century Van Eyck masterpiece, the Adoration of the Mystic Lamb

programme.title: Marcus Wareing Simply Provence
programme.desc: Marcus wants to impress the locals with a French version of the classic Sunday roast and find out how they enjoy their take on the sandwich

programme.title: Springwatch

There is a look at a multitude of species in the waterways, revealing a hidden world playing out in the reed beds. Iolo Williams reveals some of the Knepp Estate's most secretive animals and meets the people passionate about rewilding this wildlife haven

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts an extended edition of the comedy panel quiz, with Alice Levine, Jason Manford and Rose Matafeo joining series regular Alan Davies to look at sugar and spice and all things nice

The annual Mid-Ulster Drama Festival continues to bring crowds from across Northern Ireland to the hall in Main Street

programme.title: Carl Frampton: On Probation

Meanwhile in Belfast, Carl meets a woman who successfully completed probation and has big plans for her future, but her struggles with alcohol continue to hang over her

programme.desc: Michael Portillo takes a luxury, panoramic Shimikaze train to the Shima peninsula. It transports visitors to Ise Jingu, Japan's most sacred Shinto shrine. The next stop is Nara, the ancient capital of Japan, a tranquil city where some 1,400 sika deer roam the green open space. He also visits the Buddhist Todaiji Temple, where he sees one of the largest bronze Buddha statues in the world

programme.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Leaving Seoul aboard South Korea's high-speed KTX train, Michael Portillo travels south through the heart of the country to explore how rail has shaped both its economy and identity. His first stop is Daejeon, a centre of science and education, where a local bakery founded by a North Korean refugee offers a small but telling story of post-war resilience

programme.desc: Documentary following the emotional and dramatic lives of elephants in Kenya's Samburu reserve. There is excitement in one family when a calf is born, but the infant's first few weeks look set to be the most dangerous of its life. Father-and-daughter team Iain and Saba Douglas-Hamilton also have a big challenge - fitting a radio collar to a three-ton female. Narrated by Sarah Parish

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: A 38-year-old paratrooper arrives at the Royal London after a paragliding accident. He has lost sensation in his legs and needs specialist high-risk surgery to fix his compacted spine and pelvis if he's to have a chance of walking again. Other patients include a pedestrian whose leg has been crushed by a bus in south London and a teenager who put his leg through a glass security door

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Documentary following Gypsy Rose Blanchard as she navigates her return to society after spending eight years in prison for the murder of her abusive mother. Gypsy-Rose looks back on her first year of freedom through never-before-seen footage, exposing the truth behind her tumultuous first 12 months as a once-again-free woman

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Gypsy-Rose is committed to her relationship with ex-fiancé Ken following her emotional, messy separation from husband Ryan. And to make things more complicated, she's now unexpectedly expecting - just six months after her release from prison. Due to her parole restrictions, a pregnant Gypsy has to juggle living in two households

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Drama written by Jack Thorne, and starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu. Sister Anna has been living a peaceful life as a nun in a convent for more than two decades. But a chance encounter with intriguing priest Father David leaves her with an uneasy feeling and threatens to disrupt the order that has governed her whole life so far.

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: After her bold declaration, Anna attempts to adjust to the new path she has chosen but comes face to face with those from her past who disapprove. Meanwhile, as gossip spreads throughout the community, David tries to ignore the noise. But he clashes with the bishop and demons from his past threaten to rear their heads. Drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the final performance at London's Hackney Empire. Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith must choose one of the five acts as the performance of the night. Chantel's a kidney transplant survivor, Findlay sings his mother's favourite song, teenager Milo stopped singing for two years after being teased, and for Iranian refugee Mina, singing was once an act of rebellion. Finally there's Elliot: a wildcard entry with the best smile in Britain

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The Hutchinson family are faced with a devastating reality, Beth extends an olive branch to her estranged brother, and Charlie falls on his sword, but not everyone's ready to forgive and forget. Meanwhile, Misbah plays matchmaker, Frankie wants to do the right thing, and Jenson supports Mercedes. Prince is smitten with Vicky, but does she feel the same? Warren makes a chilling discovery, and Nancy reaches breaking point

programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith go on holiday, while Woody begins dating an elderly woman who finds him irresistible, but only as long as he dresses as celebrated author Mark Twain. American comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: A Kiss Is Still a Kiss
programme.desc: Rebecca makes a pass at her boss in a moment of weakness and has to rely on Sam to help her out of an embarrassing predicament. American bar-room comedy, starring Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam is delighted when Rebecca invites him back to her place and thinks all his Christmases have come at once. Meanwhile, Norm and a group of professional Santas look forward to the end of the festive season. American bar-room comedy starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.desc: Ray offers to appear as a guest on a local radio show, but is dismayed to discover the host hates him. To make matters worse, Robert digs up some childhood grievances. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert finally decides to propose to Amy and persuades Ray to accompany him to meet her parents - who prove far from amenable to the idea. Comedy, starring Monica Horn, Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra urges Ray to be firmer with the twins, but his heavy-handed approach to discipline soon has her backtracking. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frederick visits Seattle and asks Frasier to take part in the radio station softball game, leaving him with only two days to learn to play the sport. Meanwhile, Niles becomes jealous of his nephew, who has developed a crush on Daphne

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz auditions for a position as the host of a radio show. After Frasier mentions to his agent Bebe that he would be sad to see his producer go, she tells the station manager that the psychiatrist will quit if Roz is hired. Comedy, guest starring Harriet Sansom Harris

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: To mark KACL's 50th anniversary, Frasier decides to recreate the station's first mystery theatre broadcast, but his over-directing of the actors turns the live show into a complete disaster - just as Niles predicted. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Three Dates and a Break-Up - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Martin and Sherry consider ending their relationship, while Frasier scores a notable success on the romantic front, dating three women in one weekend. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Marsha Mason

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to Dumfries to meet dairy farmer Jennifer, who has a former milking parlour overflowing with unwanted stuff

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a hamlet in France welcome guests to a 50th birthday party and a couple from Eastbourne discover the water has been cut off at their village in Portugal. In France, one of the owners has to spend Christmas alone

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Amber Gill joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Claire from Bedfordshire has been vacationing on Majorca since she was a child and feels a special connection with the island. She wants to buy her very own holiday home in the heart of its capital, Palma, and brings along lifelong friend Debbie to help her with the search. Claire has a budget of £190,000, so Craig Rowe tries to find five attractive properties available within that sum to show her

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Joanne hosts a singles night at the Best of British pub near Orlando. Andreas wants to expand his bootcamp brand and Holly ventures into historical costumes to grow her business

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de la Boutinière, Alison and Zion have just weeks left to complete a three-year wedding garden makeover before the first bridal party arrive. Tim and Krys get stuck with eight tons of quick-drying concrete. Tim and Sasha upgrade their chicken coop

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Lisa and Paul from East Yorkshire search for a family villa in Alicante, with sisters Charlotte and Sophie Rodriguez on hand to guide them through the local property market. On the Costa Blanca, Jo and Andrew Alderton help find a permanent Spanish home for former police officer Kevin and his wife Debbie

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Ellie Taylor and Liam Charles welcome a fresh batch of professional pastry chefs to compete for the title. Judges Cherish Finden and Benoit Blin set the tasks, beginning with the secret challenge, which sees the teams working without a recipe to create French classic choux pastry ring the Paris-Brest - but with a twist. Then they serve up showpieces inspired by childhood toys, each concealing crumble and custard-themed desserts elevated to new heights

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Anna's confidence is knocked when she is urged to reconsider her decision. David is still firmly in denial and starts to withdraw from the people closest to him. But when the church choir beach trip throws them into close proximity, Anna and David are forced to face some uncomfortable truths and secrets spill out. Romantic drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ninety-two-year old Mary is rushed in to Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham having been trapped under her car. Second World War veteran Norman, who's 95, is in resus with a dangerously low heart rate, and four-year-old George has come to the children's emergency department with his dad after getting a stone mysteriously stuck up his nose while playing football

programme.title: Untold
programme.desc: Journalist Tir Dhondy investigates the gangs recruiting young British women as drug mules to smuggle huge quantities of cannabis from party destination Thailand back to the UK

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox, David Wilson and Dr Graham Hill investigate the murder of Janine Downes, a 22-year-old mother of three and sex worker from Wolverhampton. On a freezing cold February evening in 1991, Janine was working in the red-light district and was seen climbing into a distinctive blue car. Hours later her naked and beaten corpse was discovered in a Shropshire layby. David and Emilia interview key witnesses and look for clues in Wolverhampton's red-light district - was Janine the victim of a potential serial killer?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Kathy and Justin kick off the competition with an Italian-inspired menu, which is overshadowed by Paul's poor table manners and tactless banter. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, it's time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarah's evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Greg and Georgie who are taking on the highly ambitious task of converting a dilapidated, 35-year-old barn in Kent. The build will be a huge challenge involving the painstaking conservation of the existing rotten structure, building a new two-storey internal steel frame and recycling everything they can to stretch their £250,000 budget

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect catches up with designer Max McMurdo, who converted a shipping container into a garden office. This time, Max has gone back to his old school in Bedford to create a classroom out of two more of the containers. George also visits a prototype for a mini home so small it can be driven on the back of a truck, and in Somerset, he meets a couple who have turned a vintage vehicle into a mobile cinema business

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Susie and Bill convert a small barn in Devon to try and make the best use of the space. Dannie and Grace prepare to welcome Barry the boar

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to astronaut Tim Peake, in a highlight from Sunday Brunch

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Amber Gill joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Woody for Hire Meets Norman of the Apes
programme.desc: Norman and Cliff have an argument leading to monkey business with an orang-utan, and nobody believes Woody when he tells the bar regulars he has met actor Robert Urich. Comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca gets a job arranging a party for one of her bosses, and reluctantly agrees to hire Sam and Woody as bartenders - but the event proves to be a disaster. Kirstie Alley and Woody Harrelson star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla's daughter-in-law Annie fills in for her at the bar, while Rebecca is furious another temporary waitress named Laurie gets more attention than she does

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray reluctantly agrees to do charity work at a hospital, but proves so popular with the patients that he starts spending more time with them than at home - much to wife Debra's dismay. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's mother and father turn up unexpectedly, intending to take their daughter back home with them. They are less than happy to find Ray there, let alone his parents, and the atmosphere is tense as the families take an instant dislike to each other

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy puts Robert in charge of writing invitations to their forthcoming wedding, but he tries to evade responsibility by seeking advice from Ray and Frank. They tell him his best bet is to make an appalling mess of the job so she will have to do it all herself. With Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Three Dates and a Break-Up - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Crane brothers congratulate themselves on getting rid of Sherry - but like the proverbial bad penny, she soon turns up again, determined not to let Martin go without a fight. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne falls out with Sherry and flees the apartment after the two have a blazing row. With nowhere else to go, she asks if she can spend the night at Niles's flat, leaving him quaking with excitement. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris - and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, though, he begins to regret his impulsiveness. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Niles asks him whether he should stay with Maris, Frasier wanders the streets in film-noir fashion to find an answer for his long-suffering brother. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jack's Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chef's advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting the Isle of Wight to meet a couple who have lots of unwanted militaria in their sheds. While Henry embarks on an ambitious project to turn tank parts into hanging baskets, Simon plans to transform old insulators into studio flat lighting

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a hamlet in the Limousin install a £10,000 septic tank, and a couple move ahead with plans for a sustainable lifestyle by buying hens. Plus, the progress of two estate agents who have spent 30 years rejuvenating a village in Portugal

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Amber Gill joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Julie and Leo are looking for a holiday home to suit three generations of their family. Leah Charles-King takes them and their budget of £120,000 to the southern Costa Blanca with hopes of finding the perfect property

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Golf professional Peter from Hertfordshire takes his wife Judy on a well-deserved break, exploring the fun side of the Florida Keys for their wedding anniversary. Holly juggles medieval business and pleasure on Florida's Gulf Coast and fire captain David hosts an Easter egg hunt

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de Montespieu, Louisa and Roger want to create a stunning new suite before a wedding, but a secret tower room and a locked safe could spell trouble. At Château de la Ruche, Tim and Rebecca want to transform a tired, neglected outbuilding into a potting shed in preparation for Rebecca's first ever flower retreat

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, Rodriguez sisters Sophie and Charlotte have the tricky task of finding a holiday home that combines plenty of inside space and a lively location close to all the action for clients Jill from Lisburn and her best pal Silvana. In Murcia, Darren and Natalie Brown are hoping to swing the perfect deal for golf-mad Brian and his wife Nikki, who wish to invest in a holiday home that could one day become a permanent base

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search for properties in west London. Philip is with Jody and Shane, originally from Canada and Australia. They have a healthy £1 million budget, although they do need a house big enough to accommodate their large international family they come to visit. Kirstie helps Roopal and Hershil, who are living with their respective parents and want a place of their own before they tie the knot in just a couple of months' time. For these foodies it's all about cooking and entertaining space. Can Kirstie find them a house with all the right ingredients?

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: David tries to make amends while a guarded Anna attempts to keep her distance, and a series of uncomfortable encounters leaves her questioning whether she has made the right choice. David is faced with a difficult congregant and must confront some demons of his own

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces reviews shows including Is It Cake, Too?, Hijack, Five Star Kitchen: Britain's Next Great Chef, Saving Giraffes: The Long Journey Home, Steph's Packed Lunch, Dr Pimple Popper, Magic Numbers: Hannah Fry's Mysterious World of Maths, and the ITV News. Featuring Martin and Roman Kemp, Jamie Carragher and Micah Richards, Miquita and Andi Oliver, Mo Gilligan with Babatunde Aléshé, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Melanie C and her brother Paul, Paul Sinha and his husband Olly, Jon Richardson and Lucy Beaumont, Fearne Cotton and Gok Wan, Clare Balding and Alice Arnold, and Zoe Ball, Johnny Ball and Woody Cook. From July 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their thoughts on the Eurovision Song Contest, Race Across the World, Jamie's Ultimate BBQ, Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly, Widow's Bay, Trading Places and Police Interceptors. They also watch the news reports about the Labour Party leadership speculation

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part fact-based crime drama. Best friends Gagandip and Ravi fell in love with student doctor Mundill, a love triangle that destroyed their friendship and ultimately ended in what the headlines called the honeytrap murder. Gagandip attempted to sexually assault Mundill, who conspired with Ravi on a revenge plot that went horribly wrong. Starring Dee Ahluwalia, Ikky Kabir and Sasha Desouza-Willock

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath
programme.desc: Part two of two. At trial, Mundill was characterised as manipulative and ruthless. Mundill, Ravi and Ravi's accomplice Darren Peters were all charged with murder but ended up with different convictions and wildly different sentences. Drawing on police interviews, text messages, court documents and original interviews, this factual drama presents a complex picture of crime and punishment

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzo's. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Flamin' Hot (2023)
programme.desc: In the mid-1970s, Richard Montanez works as a cleaner in California for Frito Lay, the snack giant responsible for many popular brands. Montanez suggests a spicy twist to one of the company's most popular lines, giving birth to Flamin' Hot Cheetos, which becomes a pop culture phenomenon. Director Eva Longoria's fact-based comedy drama, starring Jesse Garcia and Annie Gonzalez

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a solutions-based guide to make brilliantly easy and delicious meals all cooked in one pan, pot or dish. Jamie cooks a traybaked salmon in a bag, tomato fritters that can be prepared in a frying pan, and roasted rolled pork with a risotto that are both cooked in the same casserole pan

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Susie and Bill soldier on with their barn conversion, but feel the pressure to make it liveable quickly so they can move in

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Amber Gill joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox, David Wilson and Dr Graham Hill investigate the murder of Janine Downes, a 22-year-old mother of three and sex worker from Wolverhampton. On a freezing cold February evening in 1991, Janine was working in the red-light district and was seen climbing into a distinctive blue car. Hours later her naked and beaten corpse was discovered in a Shropshire layby. David and Emilia interview key witnesses and look for clues in Wolverhampton's red-light district - was Janine the victim of a potential serial killer?

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Gypsy-Rose is committed to her relationship with ex-fiancé Ken following her emotional, messy separation from husband Ryan. And to make things more complicated, she's now unexpectedly expecting - just six months after her release from prison. Due to her parole restrictions, a pregnant Gypsy has to juggle living in two households

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Drama written by Jack Thorne, and starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu. Sister Anna has been living a peaceful life as a nun in a convent for more than two decades. But a chance encounter with intriguing priest Father David leaves her with an uneasy feeling and threatens to disrupt the order that has governed her whole life so far.

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: After her bold declaration, Anna attempts to adjust to the new path she has chosen but comes face to face with those from her past who disapprove. Meanwhile, as gossip spreads throughout the community, David tries to ignore the noise. But he clashes with the bishop and demons from his past threaten to rear their heads. Drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the final performance at London's Hackney Empire. Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith must choose one of the five acts as the performance of the night. Chantel's a kidney transplant survivor, Findlay sings his mother's favourite song, teenager Milo stopped singing for two years after being teased, and for Iranian refugee Mina, singing was once an act of rebellion. Finally there's Elliot: a wildcard entry with the best smile in Britain

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The Hutchinson family are faced with a devastating reality, Beth extends an olive branch to her estranged brother, and Charlie falls on his sword, but not everyone's ready to forgive and forget. Meanwhile, Misbah plays matchmaker, Frankie wants to do the right thing, and Jenson supports Mercedes. Prince is smitten with Vicky, but does she feel the same? Warren makes a chilling discovery, and Nancy reaches breaking point

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Amber Gill in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith go on holiday, while Woody begins dating an elderly woman who finds him irresistible, but only as long as he dresses as celebrated author Mark Twain. American comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: A Kiss Is Still a Kiss
programme.desc: Rebecca makes a pass at her boss in a moment of weakness and has to rely on Sam to help her out of an embarrassing predicament. American bar-room comedy, starring Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam is delighted when Rebecca invites him back to her place and thinks all his Christmases have come at once. Meanwhile, Norm and a group of professional Santas look forward to the end of the festive season. American bar-room comedy starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray offers to appear as a guest on a local radio show, but is dismayed to discover the host hates him. To make matters worse, Robert digs up some childhood grievances. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert finally decides to propose to Amy and persuades Ray to accompany him to meet her parents - who prove far from amenable to the idea. Comedy, starring Monica Horn, Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.desc: Part two of two. The Crane brothers congratulate themselves on getting rid of Sherry - but like the proverbial bad penny, she soon turns up again, determined not to let Martin go without a fight. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne falls out with Sherry and flees the apartment after the two have a blazing row. With nowhere else to go, she asks if she can spend the night at Niles's flat, leaving him quaking with excitement. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris - and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, though, he begins to regret his impulsiveness. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Niles asks him whether he should stay with Maris, Frasier wanders the streets in film-noir fashion to find an answer for his long-suffering brother. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jack's Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chef's advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting the Isle of Wight to meet a couple who have lots of unwanted militaria in their sheds. While Henry embarks on an ambitious project to turn tank parts into hanging baskets, Simon plans to transform old insulators into studio flat lighting

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a hamlet in the Limousin install a £10,000 septic tank, and a couple move ahead with plans for a sustainable lifestyle by buying hens. Plus, the progress of two estate agents who have spent 30 years rejuvenating a village in Portugal

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Amber Gill joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Julie and Leo are looking for a holiday home to suit three generations of their family. Leah Charles-King takes them and their budget of £120,000 to the southern Costa Blanca with hopes of finding the perfect property

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Golf professional Peter from Hertfordshire takes his wife Judy on a well-deserved break, exploring the fun side of the Florida Keys for their wedding anniversary. Holly juggles medieval business and pleasure on Florida's Gulf Coast and fire captain David hosts an Easter egg hunt

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de Montespieu, Louisa and Roger want to create a stunning new suite before a wedding, but a secret tower room and a locked safe could spell trouble. At Château de la Ruche, Tim and Rebecca want to transform a tired, neglected outbuilding into a potting shed in preparation for Rebecca's first ever flower retreat

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, Rodriguez sisters Sophie and Charlotte have the tricky task of finding a holiday home that combines plenty of inside space and a lively location close to all the action for clients Jill from Lisburn and her best pal Silvana. In Murcia, Darren and Natalie Brown are hoping to swing the perfect deal for golf-mad Brian and his wife Nikki, who wish to invest in a holiday home that could one day become a permanent base

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search for properties in west London. Philip is with Jody and Shane, originally from Canada and Australia. They have a healthy £1 million budget, although they do need a house big enough to accommodate their large international family they come to visit. Kirstie helps Roopal and Hershil, who are living with their respective parents and want a place of their own before they tie the knot in just a couple of months' time. For these foodies it's all about cooking and entertaining space. Can Kirstie find them a house with all the right ingredients?

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: David tries to make amends while a guarded Anna attempts to keep her distance, and a series of uncomfortable encounters leaves her questioning whether she has made the right choice. David is faced with a difficult congregant and must confront some demons of his own

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces reviews shows including Is It Cake, Too?, Hijack, Five Star Kitchen: Britain's Next Great Chef, Saving Giraffes: The Long Journey Home, Steph's Packed Lunch, Dr Pimple Popper, Magic Numbers: Hannah Fry's Mysterious World of Maths, and the ITV News. Featuring Martin and Roman Kemp, Jamie Carragher and Micah Richards, Miquita and Andi Oliver, Mo Gilligan with Babatunde Aléshé, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Melanie C and her brother Paul, Paul Sinha and his husband Olly, Jon Richardson and Lucy Beaumont, Fearne Cotton and Gok Wan, Clare Balding and Alice Arnold, and Zoe Ball, Johnny Ball and Woody Cook. From July 2023

programme.title: Untold
programme.desc: Journalist Tir Dhondy investigates the gangs recruiting young British women as drug mules to smuggle huge quantities of cannabis from party destination Thailand back to the UK

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Engineer Ellie and nuclear project manager Callum are both self-confessed nerds. But will their quiet chemistry prove the perfect solution? Author and dating expert Beckie is ready to leave toyboys behind, as she meets romantic poet Paul. DJ John wants to relight his love life. He's matched with high-energy environmentalist Susha. Seventy-two-year-old Andy hopes to strike the right balance with footballer Jan

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath
programme.desc: Part two of two. At trial, Mundill was characterised as manipulative and ruthless. Mundill, Ravi and Ravi's accomplice Darren Peters were all charged with murder but ended up with different convictions and wildly different sentences. Drawing on police interviews, text messages, court documents and original interviews, this factual drama presents a complex picture of crime and punishment

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzo's. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Flamin' Hot (2023)
programme.desc: In the mid-1970s, Richard Montanez works as a cleaner in California for Frito Lay, the snack giant responsible for many popular brands. Montanez suggests a spicy twist to one of the company's most popular lines, giving birth to Flamin' Hot Cheetos, which becomes a pop culture phenomenon. Director Eva Longoria's fact-based comedy drama, starring Jesse Garcia and Annie Gonzalez

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a solutions-based guide to make brilliantly easy and delicious meals all cooked in one pan, pot or dish. Jamie cooks a traybaked salmon in a bag, tomato fritters that can be prepared in a frying pan, and roasted rolled pork with a risotto that are both cooked in the same casserole pan

Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs

To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

When she opened Café Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago's ongoing bet about who can make the most arrests comes to an embarrassing conclusion, while Boyle receives a medal following the shooting, but his pain medication loosens his tongue and he starts to reveal what he really thinks of his colleagues

programme.desc: For his first task back in the field, Jeffords prepares to join Peralta and Boyle on a mission to infiltrate a gym where steroids are being sold illegally, but Peralta begins to have second thoughts about whether the sergeant is ready. Meanwhile, Santiago and Diaz try to determine who has burgled Gin's flat

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Halloween is Claire's favourite holiday, but this year she is snowed under at work, so she allows Phil to take over the house-decorating duties - a decision she soon comes to regret. Jay isn't too happy with the Shrek costume Gloria picked out for him so makes a last-minute change, and soon becomes attached to his new outfit, while Mitch's attempt to escape from a work slump hits a stumbling block

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire aren't too happy when Haley starts spending a lot of time with Andy. Gloria announces she wants Manny to learn Spanish, so hires a dashing teacher for him, and Cameron and Mitchell make the headlines after meeting a news reporter at a school function

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil steps up to the plate to cook Thanksgiving dinner, employing Luke as his sous chef. However, Claire is not convinced the pair can pull it off, so buys a back-up bird. Jay and Gloria's plan to go away for the holiday is scuppered, so the pair decide to maintain a low profile. Meanwhile, Mitch forces Cam to play bad cop when Lily refuses to wear a nice dress. Nigella Lawson guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch reluctantly lets his distressed colleague Brenda stay the night, Phil and Claire think Alex has let her imagination run wild after she tells them she has a boyfriend, and Jay hits a Manny-shaped obstacle while trying to get out of accompanying Gloria to a party. Kirsten Johnston (3rd Rock from the Sun) guest stars, with Jesse Tyler Ferguson, Ty Burrell, Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart gets into trouble with the police for vandalising Flanders' Beatles memorabilia, so Marge sends him on an organised activity scheme to make sure he is supervised at all times. Unfortunately, Homer is appointed team leader, and it is not long before things start to fall apart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Maggie becomes obsessed with unlikely babysitter Moe - much to the dismay of Marge and Homer, who think he is an unsuitable role model and ban him from seeing her again

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a bounty hunter to earn extra money and hires an unlikely assistant in the form of Ned Flanders - who ends up pursuing him on a charge of skipping bail over a trivial offence. Meanwhile, Marge takes a job at an unusual bakery

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The police give the Osbornes some worrying news, two residents decide to move forward together, and when Warren steps in to help Mercedes, sparks might re-ignite

programme.title: The Simpsons
