programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Hunted, Bake Off: The Professionals, Made in Chelsea, Love in the Jungle, Top of the Pops 1992, Dickinson's Real Deal, Britain's Got Talent, and BBC News coverage of the Prime Minister's apparent involvement in Partygate

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Business development manager Emily is looking for a tall, dark, handsome man with good manners, but when part-time model Matt starts talking about alien abduction their conversation is at risk of drying up. Martial arts instructor Ian meets Liverpudlian Lindsay, who's ready to date again after a difficult few years, and he certainly seems to live up to her expectations, while receptionist Natasha, who has been out of the dating game for a couple of years, sits down with chef Oskar, whose laidback manner quickly puts her at ease

Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Who Are You Going to Telephone?
programme.desc: Adam abandons Pops to go trick-or-treating with some new friends, but he gets a shock when he discovers what they are really planning. Meanwhile, Beverly dons a costume so she can attend a teenager's Halloween party in secret and protect Barry from social humiliation. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Call Me When You Get There
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled by the freedom his new driving licence brings, until Beverly insists he sticks to her 10 rules of the road at all times. Meanwhile, Pops refuses to wear an emergency alert bracelet and is forced to call Adam when he suffers a fall. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Liam and Lynn, best man Simon and bridesmaid Kirsty are reunited on camera for the first time since their Alien Autopsy wedding in 2013

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Elsewhere, things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Kathy and Justin kick off the competition with an Italian-inspired menu, which is overshadowed by Paul's poor table manners and tactless banter. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, it's time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarah's evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire thinks Luke is up to no good with his friends, so she persuades a reluctant Phil into helping her spy on their son. Gloria is suspicious of Jay when he starts moaning amorously in his sleep and Mitch struggles to keep a secret from Cam

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil, Jay and Luke wage war against three generations of Thorpes, including Phil's arch- rival Gil. Mitch and Cam ask Claire to collect Lily from school - but forget to mention the outbreak of head lice - and Gloria chaperones a field trip, giving her cause to worry about Manny's lack of self-confidence

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge has plastic surgery in an effort to lose weight, but a mix-up results in her being given breast implants instead - much to Homer's delight. With the guest voices of Adam West and Burt Ward, stars of 1960s TV series Batman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family takes part in a new reality TV show set in the 19th century, which proves unpopular with viewers, prompting the producers to try a series of increasingly desperate and dangerous ploys in a bid to boost ratings. With the guest voice of former boxer Larry Holmes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is the target of a mysterious murder attempt at a sauna, so Chief Wiggum orders Sideshow Bob's early release from prison to help identify the culprit. Featuring the guest voice of Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart takes pity on Mrs Krabappel and nominates her for the prestigious Teacher of the Year competition held in Florida, making Principal Skinner fear she will find another job if she wins. With the guest voice of Little Richard

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a string of hotel robberies together, Peralta is upset to discover Santiago is considering leaving the precinct to work with his rival, the Vulture, in the special crimes unit. Holt and Jeffords try to think up some strategies to make the team more efficient. Featuring a guest appearance by Adam Sandler

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt invites the entire squad to his house to celebrate his birthday, but Jeffords struggles to keep everyone in line, with Peralta and Santiago making a bad impression on their host's husband Kevin. Meanwhile, Boyle's love of food leads to a romantic connection with an older woman, and Diaz introduces Gina to some psychologists - who find her to be a fascinating subject

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley turns 21, so the adults hit a bar, where Claire is desperate to appear more of a pal than a nagging, uptight mum, and Cameron and Mitchell are distressed when their 'cool' credentials come up short. Phil and Jay's quick pitstop to buy a present takes a disastrous turn, too, while back at home, Alex, Manny and Luke are left to babysit Lily

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Manny are on their way back from breakfast at the pancake house when Phil is forced to swerve out of the way of an oncoming truck, a brush with death that prompts them all to re-evaulate their lives. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire confronts neighbours from hell Ronnie and Amber about the eyesore of a boat on their front lawn - and when they refuse to move it, Phil has no alternative but to call in the big guns - dad Frank and a few of his retired pals. Meanwhile, Cam takes Lily to clown school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil takes it hard when Luke gives him the 'teenage cold shoulder' - a day he always knew was coming - so he goes in search of a stand-in son. A dilemma presents itself for Jay when Gloria suspects Joe is allergic to Stella, while Mitchell does some freelance legal work for Claire, an experience he finds rather enlightening

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An irreverent take on the Prince and the Pauper. Bart enthusiastically trades lives with wealthy lookalike Simon Woosterfield after landing himself in trouble. Simon settles into life at home with the Simpsons, but Bart finds the lavish lifestyle too much to handle when he becomes the target of all his new friends' pranks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge remember the ups and downs of their marriage through a series of flashbacks, including the time they each began flirting with guests at a glamorous party - a situation that led to a food fight and an unexpected swim in the pool

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his son's new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield is the setting for parodies of Mad Men, Michael Bay's Transformers and It's the Great Pumpkin, Charlie Brown in this Halloween-themed episode. Homer's vote on election day is misread by a renegade machine, Lisa's Malibu Stacy car turns into a robot determined to start a war, and a giant pumpkin seeks revenge

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Selma decides to take her Aunt Gladys's advice and start a family - but a day in charge of Bart and Lisa at a beer-themed amusement park soon changes her mind

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebrities get their final consultations, David and Coleen head to the farm with their dates, while Lucinda decides who meets her emotional and physical desires

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Student Leah is on her first-ever date and sits down for a meal with Ashley from Huddersfield, who has hair to rival Harry Styles and a winning superstar smile. Liverpudlian welder Daniel lacks confidence with woman, but bonds with student midwife Emily over their shared passion for romcom films, while Antonia hopes to meet a man who wants to get to know the woman behind the uniform, but finds it difficult to let her guard down when she meets 34-year-old rugby player Pete

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recipe developer Mimi is looking for a fun-loving fellow creative and her date with rugby referee and sausage roll-maker Joel starts well when he turns up with a gift for her. Theatre producer Sue, meets American psychologist Beri, who is looking for an English rose, while rugby player Dan seems to tick all of Irish model Laura's boxes, but when she finds out what he does for a living, things could take a turn for the worse

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. There's also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebrities get their final consultations, David and Coleen head to the farm with their dates, while Lucinda decides who meets her emotional and physical desires

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is determined to make friends with her reserved and softly spoken neighbours, the Kremps, so she bombards them with invitations to a barbecue. Meanwhile, Barry and Erica battle for control of the family's telephone line and beg their parents to get a second one installed. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly reignites a long-standing feud after she invites Murray's unreliable brother to visit at Thanksgiving. Meanwhile, Adam upsets the balance of power between him and Barry after he wins a ball game between them for the first time. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Groom Kev, his ex-paratrooper best man Sam, bride Trish and her best friend Charlene join together to relive one of the most turbulent weddings in the show's history

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Alice gives Hugo a Spice Girls inspired tattoo, Pash alters Shelly's preposterous poem inking, and Uzzi works on cover-up for Craig and his horrible horse tattoo

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. John Robins demonstrates the power of his forearms, Steve Pemberton stains his shirt with orange juice, and Sophie Willan repeatedly shouts the name of a body part in Little Alex Horne's little flustered face. Taskmaster Greg Davies has his usual task of trying to award points for things such as Nick Mohammed constructing a bottle orchestra and Joanne McNally trying to act out the word 'beer'

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Bill Bailey taking on guest captain Joe Wilkinson and Isy Suttie. Susie Dent is joined by Joe Lycett in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO and co-founder of massage therapy chain Massage Heights, poses as a contestant on a TV reality show who is trying fund her own business. After spending nine years moulding the company, she decides to find out first-hand how her retreats are doing so she can fix potential problems before expanding the business to 300 new locations

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bruce 'Two Dogs' Bozsum, the chairman of a Native American gaming and entertainment empire, goes undercover among his own employees to learn how he might be able to improve his organisation and ensure it flourishes for generations to come. He poses as a reality TV contestant who is trying to win funds to start up his own business, before revealing his true identity and offering rewards to some of the memorable people he has met

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? With a baby on the way and two dogs, Catherine and Nick are ready for a big move. But six months on the market with no luck and no feedback have left them feeling lost. Can the brothers turn their unsellable property into a place to scream and shout about?Short:Expectant parents Catherine and Nick are ready for a big move but are having no luck. Can the brothers turn their unsellable property into a place to scream and shout about?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stoke-on-Trent couples Rob and Rich, Eddie 'The Beast' Hall and wife Alex, and Simon and spouse Lauren try to win £1,000 by throwing the perfect dinner party. Rob and Rich are first, going all-out to impress with fine dining cuisine

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bike restorer Ian and his Lithuanian-born fiancee Loretta kick off the competition in Stockport with dishes inspired by their Indian and Lithuanian heritage. Day two sees Gemma and Emily, aka 'Gemily', attempt to woo their guests with their Moroccan-themed menu. Finally, it's Tim and Luan's chance to show the other couples how it should be done as they offer up a taste of their favourite dishes

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 22-year-old man hopes to give his fiancee of four months her perfect wedding. However, while bride Alex dreams of being surrounded by friends and family at a traditional ceremony, groom Luke wants to get married on the party island of Ibiza, where the couple first met

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 22-year-old care worker hopes to give his 25-year-old hairstylist fiancee the wedding of her dreams. However, the groom has a reputation for partying on a regular basis and being unreliable with money, and the bride's regular change of image makes it difficult for him to determine what type of ceremony would be to her liking

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: The chairman and CEO of a New Jersey-based company providing chauffeured luxury transportation goes to work among his own staff by posing as a contestant in a reality show. David Seelinger believes that the quality of customer care helps maintain a company's reputation, and wants to make sure his firm is on the right track for the future

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Robert Powells, co-founder and president of Rocket Fizz Soda Pop and Candy Shops, the largest fizzy drink and sweet shop franchise in America, dons a disguise to go undercover in his own company. The California-based firm has experienced rapid growth and with that comes the responsibility to make sure it stays on track as it gets bigger, so Robert is keen to find out more about the challenges the organisation faces

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? After Dana and Andy ripped apart their home, Andy got a new job, leaving little time for DIY-ing. So it looks like a state andnow it's up to Jonathan to finish what they started. Meanwhile, Drew keeps his cool while looking for a family-friendly country home with space for a hockey rink. And is it that much of a surprise when Dana and Andy fall for yet another fixer-upper?Short:After Dana and Andy ripped apart their home, it was left in a state. Now it's up to Jonathan to finish what they started. Meanwhile, Drew keeps his cool while looking for a home with space for a hockey rink

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in north London compete to host the best dinner party. First to host are husband and wife Elorm and Mimi, who are confident their Afro-fusion menu and some Afro-beats will see them triumph. Night two sees Kiri and Dale host a soiree that includes an introduction to the host's love of taxidermy. On the final night, hosts Serge and Eleni treat their guests to a menu originating from their Greek-Cypriot heritage. Their twist is a somewhat unique 'Kebab Olympics' in the back garden

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. Greg Davies has been presented with a great many bizarre moments during his glorious reign as the Taskmaster, but this episode ups the ante in the strangeness stakes. Why has John Robins attached oars to his arms? Why does Nick Mohammed keep winking at Alex Horne? Why is Sophie Willan making a wolf beatbox? Why is Steve Pemberton skinning a mannequin? And why has Joanne McNally wilfully desecrated Greg's noble statue?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show, with Sean Lock and Henning Wehn taking on guest captain Bill Bailey and Jessica Hynes. Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Mum falls out with grandma over some new curtains, leaving it up to Adam to help settle their differences. Meanwhile, Adam's father drops the evening meal on the kitchen floor and scoops it back into the dish, hoping to keep his blunder a secret. Comedy, starring Simon Bird and Tom Rosenthal

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The siblings' father lands himself in trouble when his wife discovers he kept his stash of science magazines after the clear-out, so he pretends to burn them in the garden. Mum's best friend comes round to try on a new dress, and Jim is distraught after his dog disappears. Comedy, guest starring Tracy-Ann Oberman, with Simon Bird and Tom Rosenthal

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: The duo decide a night on the town is in order and find themselves getting acquainted with a teenage goth at Lazerbowl. Jeremy perseveres with Toni, despite her love for Peter Gabriel, and Mark discovers a melon has more merits than a bowling ball

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark makes a new friend at a business conference and Jeremy reluctantly considers accepting Super Hans as a replacement flatmate - but soon decides against it. Offbeat comedy, starring Robert Webb, Olivia Coleman and David Mitchell

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: Sketch, Alice and Jay take their tattoo cover-up operation abroad in an attempt to stop more holiday-makers returning home with disastrous ink-jobs. Ian needs help from Sketch to cover his Magaluf monstrosity, Alice helps Aston with his ugly Ibiza sunset, and Jay gives Callum a portrait to remember on his final holiday before he joins the army. Alice, Jay, Sketch and Paisley also make the most of their time off in the sun by hitting the water park and going paragliding

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

Why has John Robins attached oars to his arms? Why does Nick Mohammed keep winking at Alex Horne? Why is Sophie Willan making a wolf beatbox? Why is Steve Pemberton skinning a mannequin? And why has Joanne McNally wilfully desecrated Greg's noble statue?

programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show, with Sean Lock and Henning Wehn taking on guest captain Bill Bailey and Jessica Hynes. Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Joe DiDomizio, CEO of travel retailer Hudson Group, goes undercover to ensure the company is fighting fit for the future. The businessman hopes to find that the company's vow to be 'the traveller's best friend' is being upheld by his employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the Larry H Miller Group of Companies and co-owner of National Basketball Association team the Utah Jazz, goes undercover. Since his father died he has made many changes to the organisation, and posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition to win a dream job, he works among his own staff to see if his dad's legacy still lives on

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? After beating cancer, Jennifer and her family are determined to live life to the fullest. Can Jonathan and Drew help them by finding a dream home with easy access to the great outdoors?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Surrey, competitive American Laura and her English husband James, treat their guests to a Tex Mex evening. On day two, Sarah and Dan have a special treat in store for their guests that nobody expects. Retired estates manager Edward and teacher Carol are accustomed to hosting dinner parties, so they aren't concerned about the competition. With rapping, monobrows, secret revelations and some fine food, the competition is wide open

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bromley, south-east London, Jo and her discerning foodie partner Alex kick off proceedings with a fine dining menu but the guests are not impressed. Day two sees Ryan and Julie go back to their roots cooking up an Americana menu, but the food fails to wow with Michelle comparing the main course to vomit. Finally it's the turn of Michelle and confident Craig, who give their guests a taste of the Caribbean

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former footballer Steven hopes to give his demanding fiancee Kayleigh the Wag wedding of her dreams, and arranges for the nuptials to take place at Thorpe Park in Surrey . However, plans for a pre-ceremony ride on an 80mph rollercoaster and a reception at the nearby conference centre fail to meet the bride's high standards

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 27-year-old man from Essex hopes to give his fiancee and former boss in the Navy the wedding of her dreams. However, he is torn between the wishes of the bride, who wants him to take charge of organising the ceremony, and his best man, who encourages him to take a more laid-back approach to the task and return to the laddish ways of his past

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Rick Forman, founder and CEO of New Jersey-based discount clothing store Forman Mills, goes incognito among his own staff posing as a contestant on a reality show. He plans to go undercover because he intends to double the number of stores in the next year and wants to make sure that all the outlets are doing well so that revenue doubles too

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jessica Herrin, the founder and CEO of direct sales company Stella & Dot, goes undercover. She pretends to be a reality show contestant to access the workforce and find out whether her original vision for the firm is still being carried out as the organisation grows

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the B&B's wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? Rosanne's husband died recently and now she wants to find a smaller home where she can get back into her art. The brothers must brush away uninspiring interiors and use their artistic licence to turn her suburban home into a masterpiece

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Essex, married couple Karen and DJ Paul are first to host with their Ibiza-themed evening. They are joined by outdoorsy Lucy and her partner Paul, who is left hungry in every course. The third couple are Zimbabwean social worker Pat and her husband Tino who are blown away by the entertainment - but not so much by the food. On day two, Pat and Tino are determined to deliver a winning Zimbabwean evening with big portions to satisfy Paul. But their unconventional dessert of mashed sweet potato proves a little too adventurous for their guests. Finally, it's Lucy and Paul's chance to show off their outdoorsy grub but their menu involves a lot of cooking on the night, leaving them stressed out while their guests are waiting

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. As the series climax approaches, Little Alex Horne risks raising notoriously prickly Greg Davies' hackles with a task in celebration of himself. Sophie Willan is baffled by mirror writing, John Robins proves to be a talented tailor, Steve Pemberton has an expletive-laden row with a bin, Joanne McNally finds a novel use for a cow's ear, and Nick Mohammed brings a tear to Greg's eye

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson join forces with Jason Manford and Roisin Conaty respectively. Sam Simmons helps the show's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam tries to celebrate his birthday, but the evening is spoiled when Sheila Bloom, who is famously obsessed with her car, makes catty remarks about his vehicle. His father then reveals he used to date her years ago, upsetting Mum in the process. Finally, the family abandons dinner and heads to a Chinese restaurant, only for Sheila to reappear, forcing Dad to explain what the pair really got up to

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam is shocked to find his mother has set him up on a date by inviting Tanya Green to dinner, and his father has dressed in a suit for the occasion. Meanwhile, Jim is locked out of his house when his dog swallows his keys. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy tries to impress Toni with his new job in a music studio, while Mark is disappointed at being passed over for promotion. Starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark thinks a funeral is the perfect place to take Sophie on a date, while Jeremy gets friendly with a group of Christians, leading the pair to conclude that death and illness are the keys to a successful romance

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The Mediterranean pop-up parlour gets a visit from holiday tattoo collector Lewis, who was left with an unsightly tattoo on his bottom after a bender in Thailand, and club rep Jamiee, whose bungled boob job gets a lift. Meanwhile, party girl Sophie's unusual animal-inspired tattoo makes a splash with Alice. Jay takes on best mates Sam and Laura's cheeky stickmen, Sketch helps Aaron with a lads' holiday regret, and spontaneous Danny's Magaluf mistake is 'wrecked-tified'

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. As the series climax approaches, Little Alex Horne risks raising notoriously prickly Greg Davies' hackles with a task in celebration of himself. Sophie Willan is baffled by mirror writing, John Robins proves to be a talented tailor, Steve Pemberton has an expletive-laden row with a bin, Joanne McNally finds a novel use for a cow's ear, and Nick Mohammed brings a tear to Greg's eye

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson join forces with Jason Manford and Roisin Conaty respectively. Sam Simmons helps the show's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Business development manager Emily is looking for a tall, dark, handsome man with good manners, but when part-time model Matt starts talking about alien abduction their conversation is at risk of drying up. Martial arts instructor Ian meets Liverpudlian Lindsay, who's ready to date again after a difficult few years, and he certainly seems to live up to her expectations, while receptionist Natasha, who has been out of the dating game for a couple of years, sits down with chef Oskar, whose laidback manner quickly puts her at ease

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: After an eventful mixer, Gabby and Joel discuss whether they can see a future together and it's an emotional day for Stephen as he opens up to the agents. Also, Coleen sees Mike again and James dates Dottie

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The newlyweds return from their honeymoon in Panama and are immediately brought back to earth with a bump when they move in together and start facing the challenges of real life. Also, a heated argument could prove disastrous for one couple's budding wedded bliss

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Philadelphia to help failing Mexican restaurant Zocalo. Owners Greg and Mary Russell met and fell in love while they were working there, and the place held such sentimental importance to them they pooled their money and bought it. Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to find Pops a person to settle down with, and sets him up on a date with a woman called Sophia who seems to fit his demanding criteria. Meanwhile, Adam and Barry bond over their discovery of a new TV channel. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly confronts her husband after discovering her engagement ring is the same one Murray gave to his former fiancee. Assisted by Pops, Adam looks to a romantic comedy film for inspiration when trying to capture the attention of his attractive neighbour. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with people featured on the show, with couples, best men, bridesmaids and family members looking back on their unconventional big days. In the first edition, Ellis and Luke are joined by best man Afro and the bride's straight-talking mum Dee to look back on their unforgettable rave wedding in 2013

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren remains determined to show Mercedes that Jenson isn't who she thinks he is. Dripping in aftershave, Prince goes round to the Maaliks to see Vicky. A spiralling Nancy tears a strip off Maddox in the village after overhearing him talk about her family to Ant - Beth and Jonah intervene

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Elsewhere, things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete to host the best dinner party and win the £1,000 prize, beginning with beautician Rachael and her partner Nick, who prepare a selection of dishes they've never made before. Dionne and Ameel prepare an Indian-inspired meal on the second night of the competition, before Angela and Jeff hope their no-nonsense menu can secure them the money

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Café Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The newlyweds return from their honeymoon in Panama and are immediately brought back to earth with a bump when they move in together and start facing the challenges of real life. Also, a heated argument could prove disastrous for one couple's budding wedded bliss

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Christmas has arrived, providing a typically chaotic time for the Pritchett-Dunphys, as Jay takes Manny to chop down a tree, Mitchell rushes to finish his shopping and Cam and Lily get into the holiday spirit at a charity event. Meanwhile, Gloria has a visit from her mum. Directed by Breaking Bad star Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to share his love of dancing with unenthusiastic son Luke and Claire struggles to hide her frustration while teaching an overly cautious Alex to drive. Mitch and Cam enter the cut-throat world of wedding venue booking

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampa's metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Blood-curdling tales from America's favourite family in another Halloween special. The spooky stories feature an island inhabited by 'manimals', plus tales about an army of Homer clones and zombie cowboys

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How I Spent My Strummer Vacation
programme.desc: Homer is asked to help the Rolling Stones with a forthcoming benefit gig, filling his head with dreams of rock 'n' roll stardom. Unfortunately, they only want him to stand in as a roadie. Featuring the voices of Mick Jagger, Keith Richards, Lenny Kravitz, Tom Petty and Elvis Costello

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Bart v Lisa v the Third Grade
programme.desc: Lisa is thrilled to learn she has been moved up a grade at school - until she discovers Bart's poor performance has caused him to be demoted to the same class. Tensions inevitably develop between the pair, but a crisis during a field trip teaches them the value of working together. With the guest voice of Tony Bennett

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago's ongoing bet about who can make the most arrests comes to an embarrassing conclusion, while Boyle receives a medal following the shooting, but his pain medication loosens his tongue and he starts to reveal what he really thinks of his colleagues

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For his first task back in the field, Jeffords prepares to join Peralta and Boyle on a mission to infiltrate a gym where steroids are being sold illegally, but Peralta begins to have second thoughts about whether the sergeant is ready. Meanwhile, Santiago and Diaz try to determine who has burgled Gin's flat

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Halloween is Claire's favourite holiday, but this year she is snowed under at work, so she allows Phil to take over the house-decorating duties - a decision she soon comes to regret. Jay isn't too happy with the Shrek costume Gloria picked out for him so makes a last-minute change, and soon becomes attached to his new outfit, while Mitch's attempt to escape from a work slump hits a stumbling block

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire aren't too happy when Haley starts spending a lot of time with Andy. Gloria announces she wants Manny to learn Spanish, so hires a dashing teacher for him, and Cameron and Mitchell make the headlines after meeting a news reporter at a school function

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil steps up to the plate to cook Thanksgiving dinner, employing Luke as his sous chef. However, Claire is not convinced the pair can pull it off, so buys a back-up bird. Jay and Gloria's plan to go away for the holiday is scuppered, so the pair decide to maintain a low profile. Meanwhile, Mitch forces Cam to play bad cop when Lily refuses to wear a nice dress. Nigella Lawson guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch reluctantly lets his distressed colleague Brenda stay the night, Phil and Claire think Alex has let her imagination run wild after she tells them she has a boyfriend, and Jay hits a Manny-shaped obstacle while trying to get out of accompanying Gloria to a party. Kirsten Johnston (3rd Rock from the Sun) guest stars, with Jesse Tyler Ferguson, Ty Burrell, Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart gets into trouble with the police for vandalising Flanders' Beatles memorabilia, so Marge sends him on an organised activity scheme to make sure he is supervised at all times. Unfortunately, Homer is appointed team leader, and it is not long before things start to fall apart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Maggie becomes obsessed with unlikely babysitter Moe - much to the dismay of Marge and Homer, who think he is an unsuitable role model and ban him from seeing her again

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a bounty hunter to earn extra money and hires an unlikely assistant in the form of Ned Flanders - who ends up pursuing him on a charge of skipping bail over a trivial offence. Meanwhile, Marge takes a job at an unusual bakery

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The police give the Osbornes some worrying news, two residents decide to move forward together, and when Warren steps in to help Mercedes, sparks might re-ignite

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Dom from Hampshire has been nominated for the show by his mum, in a desperate attempt to break his dismal dating record. Dom wants to find a partner who shares his love of adventure and isn't bothered by his posh boy charm. There's also 22-year-old pansexual Izzy, who is open to dating any gender, but with so much on offer, will she make the right choice?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. There's also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: PK Humble lands himself in trouble with the agents, but his day gets a whole lot better when he goes on a date with Joan. Stephen meets Claira for a make-or-break chat

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Who Are You Going to Telephone?
programme.desc: Adam abandons Pops to go trick-or-treating with some new friends, but he gets a shock when he discovers what they are really planning. Meanwhile, Beverly dons a costume so she can attend a teenager's Halloween party in secret and protect Barry from social humiliation. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Call Me When You Get There
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled by the freedom his new driving licence brings, until Beverly insists he sticks to her 10 rules of the road at all times. Meanwhile, Pops refuses to wear an emergency alert bracelet and is forced to call Adam when he suffers a fall. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Liam and Lynn, best man Simon and bridesmaid Kirsty are reunited on camera for the first time since their Alien Autopsy wedding in 2013

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Elsewhere, things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another

Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, it's time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarah's evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire thinks Luke is up to no good with his friends, so she persuades a reluctant Phil into helping her spy on their son. Gloria is suspicious of Jay when he starts moaning amorously in his sleep and Mitch struggles to keep a secret from Cam

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil, Jay and Luke wage war against three generations of Thorpes, including Phil's arch- rival Gil. Mitch and Cam ask Claire to collect Lily from school - but forget to mention the outbreak of head lice - and Gloria chaperones a field trip, giving her cause to worry about Manny's lack of self-confidence

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge has plastic surgery in an effort to lose weight, but a mix-up results in her being given breast implants instead - much to Homer's delight. With the guest voices of Adam West and Burt Ward, stars of 1960s TV series Batman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family takes part in a new reality TV show set in the 19th century, which proves unpopular with viewers, prompting the producers to try a series of increasingly desperate and dangerous ploys in a bid to boost ratings. With the guest voice of former boxer Larry Holmes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is the target of a mysterious murder attempt at a sauna, so Chief Wiggum orders Sideshow Bob's early release from prison to help identify the culprit. Featuring the guest voice of Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart takes pity on Mrs Krabappel and nominates her for the prestigious Teacher of the Year competition held in Florida, making Principal Skinner fear she will find another job if she wins. With the guest voice of Little Richard

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a string of hotel robberies together, Peralta is upset to discover Santiago is considering leaving the precinct to work with his rival, the Vulture, in the special crimes unit. Holt and Jeffords try to think up some strategies to make the team more efficient. Featuring a guest appearance by Adam Sandler

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt invites the entire squad to his house to celebrate his birthday, but Jeffords struggles to keep everyone in line, with Peralta and Santiago making a bad impression on their host's husband Kevin. Meanwhile, Boyle's love of food leads to a romantic connection with an older woman, and Diaz introduces Gina to some psychologists - who find her to be a fascinating subject

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley turns 21, so the adults hit a bar, where Claire is desperate to appear more of a pal than a nagging, uptight mum, and Cameron and Mitchell are distressed when their 'cool' credentials come up short. Phil and Jay's quick pitstop to buy a present takes a disastrous turn, too, while back at home, Alex, Manny and Luke are left to babysit Lily

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Manny are on their way back from breakfast at the pancake house when Phil is forced to swerve out of the way of an oncoming truck, a brush with death that prompts them all to re-evaulate their lives. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire confronts neighbours from hell Ronnie and Amber about the eyesore of a boat on their front lawn - and when they refuse to move it, Phil has no alternative but to call in the big guns - dad Frank and a few of his retired pals. Meanwhile, Cam takes Lily to clown school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil takes it hard when Luke gives him the 'teenage cold shoulder' - a day he always knew was coming - so he goes in search of a stand-in son. A dilemma presents itself for Jay when Gloria suspects Joe is allergic to Stella, while Mitchell does some freelance legal work for Claire, an experience he finds rather enlightening

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An irreverent take on the Prince and the Pauper. Bart enthusiastically trades lives with wealthy lookalike Simon Woosterfield after landing himself in trouble. Simon settles into life at home with the Simpsons, but Bart finds the lavish lifestyle too much to handle when he becomes the target of all his new friends' pranks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge remember the ups and downs of their marriage through a series of flashbacks, including the time they each began flirting with guests at a glamorous party - a situation that led to a food fight and an unexpected swim in the pool

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his son's new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield is the setting for parodies of Mad Men, Michael Bay's Transformers and It's the Great Pumpkin, Charlie Brown in this Halloween-themed episode. programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.desc: Student Leah is on her first-ever date and sits down for a meal with Ashley from Huddersfield, who has hair to rival Harry Styles and a winning superstar smile. Liverpudlian welder Daniel lacks confidence with woman, but bonds with student midwife Emily over their shared passion for romcom films, while Antonia hopes to meet a man who wants to get to know the woman behind the uniform, but finds it difficult to let her guard down when she meets 34-year-old rugby player Pete

Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to find Pops a person to settle down with, and sets him up on a date with a woman called Sophia who seems to fit his demanding criteria. Meanwhile, Adam and Barry bond over their discovery of a new TV channel. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly confronts her husband after discovering her engagement ring is the same one Murray gave to his former fiancee. Assisted by Pops, Adam looks to a romantic comedy film for inspiration when trying to capture the attention of his attractive neighbour. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with people featured on the show, with couples, best men, bridesmaids and family members looking back on their unconventional big days. In the first edition, Ellis and Luke are joined by best man Afro and the bride's straight-talking mum Dee to look back on their unforgettable rave wedding in 2013

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren remains determined to show Mercedes that Jenson isn't who she thinks he is. Dripping in aftershave, Prince goes round to the Maaliks to see Vicky. A spiralling Nancy tears a strip off Maddox in the village after overhearing him talk about her family to Ant - Beth and Jonah intervene

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Elsewhere, things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete to host the best dinner party and win the £1,000 prize, beginning with beautician Rachael and her partner Nick, who prepare a selection of dishes they've never made before. Dionne and Ameel prepare an Indian-inspired meal on the second night of the competition, before Angela and Jeff hope their no-nonsense menu can secure them the money

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Café Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The newlyweds return from their honeymoon in Panama and are immediately brought back to earth with a bump when they move in together and start facing the challenges of real life. Also, a heated argument could prove disastrous for one couple's budding wedded bliss

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Christmas has arrived, providing a typically chaotic time for the Pritchett-Dunphys, as Jay takes Manny to chop down a tree, Mitchell rushes to finish his shopping and Cam and Lily get into the holiday spirit at a charity event. Meanwhile, Gloria has a visit from her mum. Directed by Breaking Bad star Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to share his love of dancing with unenthusiastic son Luke and Claire struggles to hide her frustration while teaching an overly cautious Alex to drive. Mitch and Cam enter the cut-throat world of wedding venue booking

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampa's metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Blood-curdling tales from America's favourite family in another Halloween special. The spooky stories feature an island inhabited by 'manimals', plus tales about an army of Homer clones and zombie cowboys

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How I Spent My Strummer Vacation
programme.desc: Homer is asked to help the Rolling Stones with a forthcoming benefit gig, filling his head with dreams of rock 'n' roll stardom. Unfortunately, they only want him to stand in as a roadie. Featuring the voices of Mick Jagger, Keith Richards, Lenny Kravitz, Tom Petty and Elvis Costello

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Bart v Lisa v the Third Grade
programme.desc: Lisa is thrilled to learn she has been moved up a grade at school - until she discovers Bart's poor performance has caused him to be demoted to the same class. Tensions inevitably develop between the pair, but a crisis during a field trip teaches them the value of working together. With the guest voice of Tony Bennett

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago's ongoing bet about who can make the most arrests comes to an embarrassing conclusion, while Boyle receives a medal following the shooting, but his pain medication loosens his tongue and he starts to reveal what he really thinks of his colleagues

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For his first task back in the field, Jeffords prepares to join Peralta and Boyle on a mission to infiltrate a gym where steroids are being sold illegally, but Peralta begins to have second thoughts about whether the sergeant is ready. Meanwhile, Santiago and Diaz try to determine who has burgled Gin's flat

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Halloween is Claire's favourite holiday, but this year she is snowed under at work, so she allows Phil to take over the house-decorating duties - a decision she soon comes to regret. Jay isn't too happy with the Shrek costume Gloria picked out for him so makes a last-minute change, and soon becomes attached to his new outfit, while Mitch's attempt to escape from a work slump hits a stumbling block

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire aren't too happy when Haley starts spending a lot of time with Andy. Gloria announces she wants Manny to learn Spanish, so hires a dashing teacher for him, and Cameron and Mitchell make the headlines after meeting a news reporter at a school function

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil steps up to the plate to cook Thanksgiving dinner, employing Luke as his sous chef. However, Claire is not convinced the pair can pull it off, so buys a back-up bird. Jay and Gloria's plan to go away for the holiday is scuppered, so the pair decide to maintain a low profile. Meanwhile, Mitch forces Cam to play bad cop when Lily refuses to wear a nice dress. Nigella Lawson guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch reluctantly lets his distressed colleague Brenda stay the night, Phil and Claire think Alex has let her imagination run wild after she tells them she has a boyfriend, and Jay hits a Manny-shaped obstacle while trying to get out of accompanying Gloria to a party. Kirsten Johnston (3rd Rock from the Sun) guest stars, with Jesse Tyler Ferguson, Ty Burrell, Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart gets into trouble with the police for vandalising Flanders' Beatles memorabilia, so Marge sends him on an organised activity scheme to make sure he is supervised at all times. Unfortunately, Homer is appointed team leader, and it is not long before things start to fall apart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Maggie becomes obsessed with unlikely babysitter Moe - much to the dismay of Marge and Homer, who think he is an unsuitable role model and ban him from seeing her again

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a bounty hunter to earn extra money and hires an unlikely assistant in the form of Ned Flanders - who ends up pursuing him on a charge of skipping bail over a trivial offence. Meanwhile, Marge takes a job at an unusual bakery

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The police give the Osbornes some worrying news, two residents decide to move forward together, and when Warren steps in to help Mercedes, sparks might re-ignite

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sets out to halt the plans of an unscrupulous businessman intending to defraud Springfield's residents by supplying them with a defective monorail system. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Dom from Hampshire has been nominated for the show by his mum, in a desperate attempt to break his dismal dating record. Dom wants to find a partner who shares his love of adventure and isn't bothered by his posh boy charm. There's also 22-year-old pansexual Izzy, who is open to dating any gender, but with so much on offer, will she make the right choice?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. There's also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: PK Humble lands himself in trouble with the agents, but his day gets a whole lot better when he goes on a date with Joan. Stephen meets Claira for a make-or-break chat

programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Who Are You Going to Telephone?
programme.desc: Adam abandons Pops to go trick-or-treating with some new friends, but he gets a shock when he discovers what they are really planning. Meanwhile, Beverly dons a costume so she can attend a teenager's Halloween party in secret and protect Barry from social humiliation. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Call Me When You Get There
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled by the freedom his new driving licence brings, until Beverly insists he sticks to her 10 rules of the road at all times. Meanwhile, Pops refuses to wear an emergency alert bracelet and is forced to call Adam when he suffers a fall. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited

programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Elsewhere, things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Kathy and Justin kick off the competition with an Italian-inspired menu, which is overshadowed by Paul's poor table manners and tactless banter. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, it's time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarah's evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire thinks Luke is up to no good with his friends, so she persuades a reluctant Phil into helping her spy on their son. Gloria is suspicious of Jay when he starts moaning amorously in his sleep and Mitch struggles to keep a secret from Cam

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil, Jay and Luke wage war against three generations of Thorpes, including Phil's arch- rival Gil. Mitch and Cam ask Claire to collect Lily from school - but forget to mention the outbreak of head lice - and Gloria chaperones a field trip, giving her cause to worry about Manny's lack of self-confidence

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge has plastic surgery in an effort to lose weight, but a mix-up results in her being given breast implants instead - much to Homer's delight. With the guest voices of Adam West and Burt Ward, stars of 1960s TV series Batman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family takes part in a new reality TV show set in the 19th century, which proves unpopular with viewers, prompting the producers to try a series of increasingly desperate and dangerous ploys in a bid to boost ratings. With the guest voice of former boxer Larry Holmes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is the target of a mysterious murder attempt at a sauna, so Chief Wiggum orders Sideshow Bob's early release from prison to help identify the culprit. Featuring the guest voice of Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart takes pity on Mrs Krabappel and nominates her for the prestigious Teacher of the Year competition held in Florida, making Principal Skinner fear she will find another job if she wins. With the guest voice of Little Richard

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a string of hotel robberies together, Peralta is upset to discover Santiago is considering leaving the precinct to work with his rival, the Vulture, in the special crimes unit. Holt and Jeffords try to think up some strategies to make the team more efficient. Featuring a guest appearance by Adam Sandler

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt invites the entire squad to his house to celebrate his birthday, but Jeffords struggles to keep everyone in line, with Peralta and Santiago making a bad impression on their host's husband Kevin. Meanwhile, Boyle's love of food leads to a romantic connection with an older woman, and Diaz introduces Gina to some psychologists - who find her to be a fascinating subject

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley turns 21, so the adults hit a bar, where Claire is desperate to appear more of a pal than a nagging, uptight mum, and Cameron and Mitchell are distressed when their 'cool' credentials come up short. Phil and Jay's quick pitstop to buy a present takes a disastrous turn, too, while back at home, Alex, Manny and Luke are left to babysit Lily

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Manny are on their way back from breakfast at the pancake house when Phil is forced to swerve out of the way of an oncoming truck, a brush with death that prompts them all to re-evaulate their lives. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire confronts neighbours from hell Ronnie and Amber about the eyesore of a boat on their front lawn - and when they refuse to move it, Phil has no alternative but to call in the big guns - dad Frank and a few of his retired pals. Meanwhile, Cam takes Lily to clown school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil takes it hard when Luke gives him the 'teenage cold shoulder' - a day he always knew was coming - so he goes in search of a stand-in son. A dilemma presents itself for Jay when Gloria suspects Joe is allergic to Stella, while Mitchell does some freelance legal work for Claire, an experience he finds rather enlightening

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An irreverent take on the Prince and the Pauper. Bart enthusiastically trades lives with wealthy lookalike Simon Woosterfield after landing himself in trouble. Simon settles into life at home with the Simpsons, but Bart finds the lavish lifestyle too much to handle when he becomes the target of all his new friends' pranks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge remember the ups and downs of their marriage through a series of flashbacks, including the time they each began flirting with guests at a glamorous party - a situation that led to a food fight and an unexpected swim in the pool

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his son's new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield is the setting for parodies of Mad Men, Michael Bay's Transformers and It's the Great Pumpkin, Charlie Brown in this Halloween-themed episode. Homer's vote on election day is misread by a renegade machine, Lisa's Malibu Stacy car turns into a robot determined to start a war, and a giant pumpkin seeks revenge

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Selma decides to take her Aunt Gladys's advice and start a family - but a day in charge of Bart and Lisa at a beer-themed amusement park soon changes her mind

Liverpudlian welder Daniel lacks confidence with woman, but bonds with student midwife Emily over their shared passion for romcom films, while Antonia hopes to meet a man who wants to get to know the woman behind the uniform, but finds it difficult to let her guard down when she meets 34-year-old rugby player Pete

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Strictly Come Dancing, Coronation Street, Antiques Roadshow, Frozen Planet II, Kings of Pain, Help! My House Is Haunted, Only Connect, and ITV News coverage of the mini-budget

programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding host a 1980s-themed episode of the contest. programme.title: Classic Mary Berry
programme.desc: The food writer is joined by chef Nathan Outlaw in Port Isaac, Cornwall, to prepare recipes inspired by the great outdoors. The duo demonstrate a range of dishes featuring local food, including Mary's take on a delicious bouillabaisse filled with some of the ocean's best offerings, as well as a freshly caught Mackerel barbecued by the sea, with a rich and crispy spatchcocked poussin marinated and cooked alongside it

programme.title: Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Interior designer Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen drops by for lunch and turns Prue's kitchen into an art gallery with a display of his latest collection of paintings, but what will someone who confesses to never cooking himself arrive at the table with? Meanwhile, Prue's husband John heads out into the grounds to plant a tree he hopes will stand for generations, while she decides to make a chocolate mousse cake - with the addition of pink peppercorns

Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

Two former cavalry soldiers must put their friendship to one side to compete for first place, but face stiff competition in a cunning prostitute, an English sportsman and a cocky would-be gunslinger. Western, starring Gene Hackman, Candice Bergen, James Coburn and Ian Bannen

programme.desc: Three cowboys, mistaken for outlaws, find themselves pursued by a relentless posse. Western, written, starring and co-produced by Jack Nicholson, with Cameron Mitchell and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.desc: Mercenary opportunist Harry Mudd programs an android to take control of the Enterprise and take it to an uncharted planet. Once there, he tries to make Kirk and his crew an offer they cannot refuse. William Shatner and Roger C Carmel star

programme.title: The Eiger Sanction (1975)
programme.desc: An art professor who once worked as an assassin is blackmailed into returning to his old career to eliminate a spy. However, his target is in the middle of a mountaineering expedition, forcing the hitman to embark on a perilous climb up the Eiger in hot pursuit. Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With George Kennedy, Jack Cassidy and Vonetta McGee

programme.title: Precious Cargo (2016)
programme.desc: A thief is marked for death by a crime boss after a heist goes badly wrong. To win back his trust, she plans to steal a cargo of rare precious gems and recruits a former lover to carry out the job. However, as the robbery is put into action, nobody is sure who to trust. Crime thriller, starring Claire Forlani and Bruce Willis

programme.title: Blood and Money (2020)
programme.desc: Jim Reed is a lonely, retired Vietnam veteran who lives in his mobile home, and hunts deer in the snowy wilds of Allagash in northern Maine. Jim's life is turned upside down when he stumbles across a dead woman and a large sum of money. Co-writer/director John Barr's thriller, starring Tom Berenger, Kristen Hager and Paul Ben-Victor.

Disaster movie, starring Charlton Heston, Ava Gardner, Genevieve Bujold, Richard Roundtree and George Kennedy

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
