programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners
programme.desc: The fate of the Ile de France. The luxury ocean liner was regarded as the pride of France, after saving many lives in the Second World War and then emerging from the conflict. programme.title: Big Cats: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: Part one of two. Biologist Patrick Aryee explores how cats have evolved throughout the millennia, learning to thrive in inhospitable environments, as well as becoming the world's most popular pet. In the first edition there is spectacular footage of caracals jumping three metres to catch flying birds, and a rare Bornean bay cat, which was thought to have been extinct. Patrick finds out how tigers made the transition from South-east Asia's steamy jungles to the -40C temperatures of Siberia, and meets 'lion whisperer' Kevin Richardson

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Aberglasney House - a derelict property in Carmarthenshire, south Wales

programme.title: The Witches (1990)
programme.desc: A boy goes on holiday with his grandmother to a seaside hotel hosting a convention of witches, who have come together to hear their leader's plan to turn all the children in England into mice. When the chief hag discovers the young lad eavesdropping at their meeting, she decides to make him one of her first victims. Children's fantasy directed by Nicolas Roeg, based on the book by Roald Dahl, and starring Anjelica Huston, Mai Zetterling, Jasen Fisher, Jane Horrocks, Rowan Atkinson and Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer (2013)
programme.desc: A farm boy accidentally rebuilds the link between the human world and a kingdom of man-eating giants in the sky, resulting in a princess being trapped in the monsters' realm. He joins a band of the king's knights on a rescue mission, but one of the group intends to betray them in a bid to seize the throne. Fantasy adventure, starring Nicholas Hoult and Ewan McGregor

programme.title: Rebellious (2024)
programme.desc: A princess is kidnapped by an evil sorcerer and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her, while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape. Animated fantasy adventure, with the voices of Vanessa Johansson and Marc Thompson

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village (2017)
programme.desc: A mysterious map sends Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on a quest into the Forbidden Forest, leading to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history. Animated adventure, with the voices of Demi Lovato, Julia Roberts, Rainn Wilson and Joe Manganiello

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz (1939)
programme.desc: Youngster Dorothy Gale is whisked over the rainbow by a tornado into the magical land of Oz, where she inadvertently kills a wicked witch - incurring the wrath of another. Setting out to find the wizard who can show her a way home, she is joined on her journey by a scarecrow, a tin man and a cowardly lion, who all hope their own wishes will be granted. Musical fantasy, with Judy Garland, Ray Bolger, Jack Haley, Bert Lahr and Frank Morgan

programme.title: Smurfs (2025)
programme.desc: When Papa Smurf is taken by evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel, Smurfette leads her fellow blue creatures on a mission to the real world to save him. Live-action animated musical fantasy comedy, featuring the voices of Rihanna, James Corden and Nick Offerman

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania (2012)
programme.desc: Dracula opens a luxury resort for monsters, to provide a refuge from terrified humans. His cosy sanctuary is disrupted when a normal man unwittingly checks in, and the situation is complicated when the unwanted guest takes a liking to the count's daughter. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2 (2015)
programme.desc: Dracula is worried that his half-human grandson is not showing any vampiric tendencies, so enlists the help of his fellow monsters in showing the youngster how it is done. The count is shocked to receive an unwelcome visit from his own father, who does not approve of his son's tolerance of humans. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation (2018)
programme.desc: Count Dracula and company participate in a cruise for sea-loving monsters, unaware that their boat is being commandeered by the monster-hating Van Helsing family. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Adam Sandler, Andy Samberg and Selena Gomez

programme.title: Hook (1991)
programme.desc: Peter Pan, who has finally grown up and is now a married lawyer with a family of his own, is whisked away by Tinkerbell to Neverland, where he must learn to fly again if he is to save his children from the clutches of Captain Hook. Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure, with Robin Williams, Dustin Hoffman, Julia Roberts, Bob Hoskins and Maggie Smith

programme.title: The Witches (1990)
programme.desc: A boy goes on holiday with his grandmother to a seaside hotel hosting a convention of witches, who have come together to hear their leader's plan to turn all the children in England into mice. When the chief hag discovers the young lad eavesdropping at their meeting, she decides to make him one of her first victims. Children's fantasy directed by Nicolas Roeg, based on the book by Roald Dahl, and starring Anjelica Huston, Mai Zetterling, Jasen Fisher, Jane Horrocks, Rowan Atkinson and Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2 (2015)
programme.desc: Dracula is worried that his half-human grandson is not showing any vampiric tendencies, so enlists the help of his fellow monsters in showing the youngster how it is done. The count is shocked to receive an unwelcome visit from his own father, who does not approve of his son's tolerance of humans. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager picks up a distress signal originating from the middle of the ocean. Joining an expedition to track the signal to its source, he discovers an unexplored island inhabited by strange creatures, and searches for a way to rescue its sole human inhabitant. Fantasy adventure sequel to Journey to the Centre of the Earth, starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine and Josh Hutcherson

programme.title: Robin and the Hoods (2024)
programme.desc: For the tenacious 11-year-old Robin and her loyal band of friends, the Hoods, the patch of overgrown scrubland at the end of their cul-de-sac is a magical kingdom. However, when the slippery property developer Clipboard dazzles the parents of the area with promises of health spas and day-care facilities, the gang risk losing their kingdom forever. Director Phil Hawkins' comedy, starring Naomie Harris, Darcey Ewart, Gwendoline Christie and Mark Williams

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice (2022)
programme.desc: A streetwise cat has the perfect money-making scam after finding a pipe-playing kid who has a horde of strangely literate rats. Animated adventure based on the Terry Pratchett story, featuring the voices of Hugh Laurie, Emilia Clarke and David Thewlis

programme.title: Peter Pan (2003)
programme.desc: The adventures of the boy who never grows old, as he whisks Wendy Darling and her brothers away to the magical world of Neverland - where they come face to face with fearsome Captain Hook. Adaptation of JM Barrie's fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave

programme.title: The Smurfs (2011)
programme.desc: The tiny blue forest-dwelling creatures flee from an evil wizard, only to end up magically transported to modern-day New York. They search for a way to get back to their own village while evading their enemy, who has followed them to the Big Apple. Fantasy comedy, with Neil Patrick Harris, Hank Azaria and Jayma Mays, plus voices of Jonathan Winters and Katy Perry

programme.title: The Smurfs 2 (2013)
programme.desc: The tiny blue forest-dwelling creatures and their human friends go on a rescue mission to Paris. Their old foe Gargamel the evil wizard has created mischievous smurfs of his own and kidnapped Smurfette to learn the secret of her magic. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Hank Azaria and Neil Patrick Harris, with the voices of Katy Perry and Christina Ricci

Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahl's book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jackson's epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkien's novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

Adaptation of JM Barrie's fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave

programme.title: Robin and the Hoods (2024)
programme.desc: For the tenacious 11-year-old Robin and her loyal band of friends, the Hoods, the patch of overgrown scrubland at the end of their cul-de-sac is a magical kingdom. However, when the slippery property developer Clipboard dazzles the parents of the area with promises of health spas and day-care facilities, the gang risk losing their kingdom forever. Director Phil Hawkins' comedy, starring Naomie Harris, Darcey Ewart, Gwendoline Christie and Mark Williams

programme.title: Rebellious (2024)
programme.desc: A princess is kidnapped by an evil sorcerer and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her, while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape. Animated fantasy adventure, with the voices of Vanessa Johansson and Marc Thompson

programme.title: Pil's Adventures (2021)
programme.desc: Pil, a young orphan living on the streets of Roc-en-Brume with her three tame weasels, disguises herself and embarks on a quest to save the heir to the throne and victim of an enchantment. Animated adventure, with the voice of Eleanor Noble

programme.title: Misneach
programme.sub-title: Tome Insuirt Grani - Neart San Eolas
programme.desc: Only one per cent of the Irish Traveller population has decided to take up third level education. A legacy of exclusion and discrimination has had a huge impact on the community, but the numbers are growing and more and more Irish travellers are refusing to be excluded from the opportunities afforded by education. Filmed one academic year, this documentary tells the story of other one group of Irish Travellers making their way through university life

programme.title: Cumasc: Seisiúin sa Black Gate
programme.desc: Programme featuring musical collaborations, recorded rehearsals, interviews and more., with the first edition featuring Liam Ó Maonlaí of the Hothouse Flowers, guitarist Niwel Tsumbu and hand drum percussionist Éamonn Cagney. In Irish

programme.title: Saol Clainne
programme.desc: Documentary series following families across Ireland facing great difficulties, fighting to overcome obstacles for themselves and their loved ones. Young carer Tomás ó Flannagáin receives his leaving cert results, Hughie Ó Duibheannaigh recounts 40 years of alcohol addiction, while Áine Hanrahan tells of her son's stroke

programme.title: Nuacht TG4
programme.desc: The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective

programme.title: An Cósta Thiar
programme.desc: Áine Ní Bhreisleáin ends her journey in Uíbh Ráthach, in South Kerry. She gains a different perspective on the sea while snorkling and surfing, explores the long history of this coastal community from the Milesians with a poet, the Seine boat with a tik tok star and ends at the majestic Sceilg Mhichíl

programme.title: Joe Burke - Ceiliúradh
programme.desc: Musicians, friends and family celebrate one of Ireland's most-loved and respected musicians, east Galway's Joe Burke who died in February 2021. Renowned for his wit and humour as well as his mastery of the accordion, Joe's influence on generations of Irish musicians was enormous. Here, contributors including Ann Conroy Burke, Mary Conroy, Frankie Gavin, Brian McGrath, Eileen O'Brien, Máire Ní Chathasaigh, Liz and Yvonne Keane, Jackie Daly, Dermot Byrne and Conchubhar Ó Luasa share music and memories in his honour

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj settle into their new living arrangement, but Penny and Raj get along so well together that Leonard starts to feel left out. Sheldon expresses an interest in Amy's work and they begin to collaborate on a scientific project

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon pushes himself to the limit when he collaborates on two scientific projects - one with Leonard and Howard, plus another with Amy - on the same day. Bernadette nears the end of her maternity leave, and looks forward to returning to work

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette find it upsetting to leave baby Halley at the nursery when Bernadette returns to work at the end of her maternity leave. The gang's university colleague Bert the geologist introduces them to his attractive new girlfriend Rebecca

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard isn't thrilled when he finds out Penny is considering taking a new job that has been offered to her by her former boyfriend Zack. Sheldon attempts to develop his brain further by learning new skills

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is offered a visiting research fellowship at Princeton University, and Raj makes some new living arrangements. When the guys complete their infinite persistence gyroscope project, events spin out of control

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard angers the university - and the entire physics community - when he gives an embarrassing interview. Amy and Bernadette bond over having to hide their success from Sheldon and Howard. Ira Flatow and Regina King guest star

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Molly plans to clear the house of junk by holding a jumble sale, but whose old possessions will get the boot? Mike takes Carl on a fishing trip to distract him from his break-up. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Vince and Joyce get married in a small ceremony after they host a dramatic Thanksgiving dinner for Mike and Molly. Meanwhile, Carl and Samuel decide to go to a singles night at Carl's church, where they discover all the love-hungry ladies are elderly

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The Captain encourages Mike to take the detective exam. Molly is supportive of the idea and he eventually agrees, but all the studying leaves him a little hot under the collar. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The Coopers discuss the possibilities of black holes and alternate universes when Dr Sturgis comes over for dinner

programme.title: Young Sheldon

Dean Norris guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Mentalist

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Property mogul Joe Hagan is on trial for the murder of his wife, but the case hinges on the testimony of a key witness. When she disappears, a judge gives Al and Carrie just 48 hours to find her, or acquire new evidence, before he dismisses the case and the accused walks free

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Caribbean cops enter the high-pressure world of fine dining when a famous chef is found stabbed to death the morning after the opening of his new restaurant. It proves to be a tricky investigation as the body was stored in a freezer, so the time of death cannot be identified - and when it turns out he was quite a hot-head in the kitchen, all his staff come under suspicion. Away from the case, Dwayne meets his match in the shape of a troublesome schoolboy, Florence has one last lesson in love for the inspector and JP makes a life-changing decision. Tara FitzGerald and Martin Compston guest star

programme.title: Unforgettable

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A marine salvage team unearth the legendary Saint Marie silver, but their celebration comes to an abrupt halt when their captain is found dead on the beach with a stab wound to his chest. With the captain's son Sam, wife Naomi and assistant Addison having watertight alibis, attention turns to rival treasure hunter Newton Farrell. Meanwhile, Dwayne is on best man duty as he organises the ultimate stag party for a terrified JP, and Florence is determined to find out what Humphrey got up to the night before his own wedding. Caribbean crime drama, guest starring Jack Donnelly (Atlantis) and Jill Halfpenny (Humans)

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A student backpacker is found dead in the showers of her hostel, and with a gun in her hand and her body slumped against the only door, all evidence points toward suicide. Humphrey isn't so sure, however, especially when he notices all her toiletries laid out and her towel missing. But when the team question the victim's boyfriend and her fellow backpackers, they find themselves with very little to go on. Meanwhile, JP prepares for the biggest day of his life as his wedding day approaches, and when Humphrey bumps into an old lady friend, Florence encourages her boss to pursue his quest for love

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Trapped in an isolated mansion during a storm, Charlie and Rex must uncover a potential killer after the hostess is drugged, while Sarah fights to keep her alive

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedians Rhod Gilbert and Ellie Taylor, musician Ronan Keating and media personality Georgia Toffolo join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As ever, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Countdown dictionary expert Susie Dent, comedian Bob Mortimer and TV presenters Ore Oduba and Stacey Solomon join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show in which participants attempt to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: David Mitchell, Noel Fielding and Holly Walsh join Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme of 'night' in an extended edition of the panel show. As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting

programme.title: Frankie Boyle's New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the week's news - with a panel of guests on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Leslie is matched with Tom on an internet dating website, while Chris and Ron take part in a burger cook-off. Comedy, starring Amy Poehler, Aziz Ansari, Nick Offerman and Rob Lowe

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers in Hidalgo seize over 200 kilos of methamphetamine concealed in a car, and the hunt is on in Detroit for some invasive insects which could destroy the US timber industry

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers find a suspicious compartment within the trailer of a truck returning to Texas, and a man hides over 300 cheap forms of medication about his person in Progreso

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage head out on a mission that is run with a strict time constraint and difficult budget circumstances

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: The chef continues his 'journey without maps', leaving the main routes and tourist hotspots behind to embark on a personal road trip along picturesque and remote backroads. Here, he heads through France's eastern border regions of Alsace and Jura - famous for Comte cheese and home to his favourite French dish of choucroute garni. He then begins to head inland, visiting Burgundy for a memorable glass of Auxey-Duresses wine, and sampling oeuf en meurette with a difference. Following a memorable Sunday lunch near the French/Swiss border, he is inspired to recreate a traditional blueberry tart

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the Christmas fun are former Test Match Special commentator Henry Blofeld, Witless star Kerry Howard, broadcaster the Rev Richard Coles and BBC News presenter Clive Myrie. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Actress Olivia Colman, JLS member Aston Merrygold, comedian Jon Richardson and wildlife presenter Michaela Strachan join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As ever, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Kemah Bob, JJ Chalmers, Kevin Clifton and Victoria Derbyshire test their general knowledge skills in the hope of winning a prize

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Part two of two. The second leg of Simon's journey begins at the Giant's Causeway, before visiting a kelp farm on Rathlin Island. He heads to the Dark Hedges in Co Antrim, one of the filming locations from Game of Thrones, and visits Belfast for the July 12 parades, discovering how the event has divided the city. He also learns more about Oliver Cromwell's influence on Ireland, attends the Gaze film festival, and meets monkeys at an animal sanctuary in the Wicklow mountains

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team proves that bad vehicles still exist, Jeremy Clarkson makes the case for the Ford Mustang as the greatest car of all time, and Starsky and Hutch actor David Soul is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson road-tests the Jaguar XJR to see how it compares with the VW Phaeton, Richard Hammond recalls why the Mk2 was a landmark in motoring and the Aston Martin DB7 GT is pushed to the limit. Boris Johnson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate British beef, using it in a suet pudding and making oxtail soup. They visit a farmer who is focusing on the future with his wagyu cattle, discover the history of the much-maligned dish tripe and learn how to roast a whole ox

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: The chef continues his 'journey without maps', leaving the main routes and tourist hotspots behind to embark on a personal road trip along picturesque and remote backroads. Here, he heads through France's eastern border regions of Alsace and Jura - famous for Comte cheese and home to his favourite French dish of choucroute garni. He then begins to head inland, visiting Burgundy for a memorable glass of Auxey-Duresses wine, and sampling oeuf en meurette with a difference. Following a memorable Sunday lunch near the French/Swiss border, he is inspired to recreate a traditional blueberry tart

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the Christmas fun are former Test Match Special commentator Henry Blofeld, Witless star Kerry Howard, broadcaster the Rev Richard Coles and BBC News presenter Clive Myrie. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Olympic cycling gold-medallist Chris Hoy, impressionist Ronni Ancona, writer and producer Danny Wallace and sports presenter Gabby Logan join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show, in which they try to dupe their opponents with plausible lies about themselves. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Kevin Eldon, Sarah Keyworth, Laila Rouass and John Whaite take part in the latest round of challenges, with all eyes on those prizes and, eventually, Friday's final

programme.title: The Way Out
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc traps the teams in an off-the-scale world where nothing is as it seems, forcing them to decipher distorted clues and tackle a ticking time bomb.

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: David Mitchell, Noel Fielding and Holly Walsh join Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme of 'night' in an extended edition of the panel show. As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting

programme.title: Frankie Boyle's New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the week's news - with a panel of guests on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain looks back on the latest events in news and politics, with the help of Ed Byrne, Rhys James, Olga Koch, Nigel Ng and Suzi Ruffell and regular panellist Hugh Dennis. As usual, stand-up and improvisation are the name of the game as the contestants try to get one up on one another. First shown in November 2019

programme.title: Mock the Week

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers in Laredo intercept a truck smuggling narcotics over the border, and a courier heading to Mexico is caught delivering guns and ammunition in Eagle Pass

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage must overcome a mechanical catastrophe to recover a beached seven-tonne catamaran at a marine sanctuary in the far Northern Territory.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: The chef explores Burgundy and the Auvergne, sampling a sorrel soup made by a chateau owner from the produce of the garden and showcasing Salers beef and Cantal cheese. Back in his Provencal country kitchen, Rick prepares Cantal bourriols - buckwheat pancakes made with farmhouse eggs and Cep mushrooms

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining regular team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are snooker veteran Steve Davis, actor Craig Parkinson, comedian Sara Pascoe and Strictly co-host Claudia Winkleman. They all have amazing stories to share, but whether or not they are true or works of fiction remains to be seen

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Kemah Bob, JJ Chalmers, Kevin Clifton and Victoria Derbyshire test their general knowledge skills in the hope of winning a prize

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary in which the presenter takes a tour of the country, travelling from the islands of the Aegean to Athens. Along the way he meets local people including gun-toting priests and the last sponge-divers in the world, and discovers how they are coping with their country's current crises

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson looks at a range of Porsche 911s, James May gets behind the wheel of a classic Triumph TR6, and the small but powerful Clio V6 is pushed to the limit. Richard Hammond puts his case forward for the Land Rover as the greatest vehicle of all time, and Anne Robinson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and the team put track cars the Mitsubishi Evo VIII and the Subaru Impreza STi through their paces, Vauxhall's VX220 Turbo is road-tested and the search for the greatest car focuses on Stuart Hall's love of the Rolls-Royce Silver Cloud. Richard Whiteley is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the relationship between food and religion and celebrate the vast range of faith-based dishes available in Britain today. They rustle up simnel cake and brisket, as well as examining the history of the hot cross bun and dropping in on an Ethiopian Christmas feast

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Kemah Bob, JJ Chalmers, Kevin Clifton and Victoria Derbyshire test their general knowledge skills in the hope of winning a prize

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Part two of two. The second leg of Simon's journey begins at the Giant's Causeway, before visiting a kelp farm on Rathlin Island. He heads to the Dark Hedges in Co Antrim, one of the filming locations from Game of Thrones, and visits Belfast for the July 12 parades, discovering how the event has divided the city. He also learns more about Oliver Cromwell's influence on Ireland, attends the Gaze film festival, and meets monkeys at an animal sanctuary in the Wicklow mountains

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team proves that bad vehicles still exist, Jeremy Clarkson makes the case for the Ford Mustang as the greatest car of all time, and Starsky and Hutch actor David Soul is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson road-tests the Jaguar XJR to see how it compares with the VW Phaeton, Richard Hammond recalls why the Mk2 was a landmark in motoring and the Aston Martin DB7 GT is pushed to the limit. Boris Johnson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate British beef, using it in a suet pudding and making oxtail soup. They visit a farmer who is focusing on the future with his wagyu cattle, discover the history of the much-maligned dish tripe and learn how to roast a whole ox

As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: The antiques dealer acquires a broken clock that holds the key to the honour of a family and a regiment thanks to some love letters from the Napoleonic era discovered inside. Ian McShane stars

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: 'The House of Screams', a local scare attraction, becomes the venue for an actual murder when a teenager is found with a sickle through his neck

programme.title: The Bill

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Jimmi helps to calm Poppy after she escapes with her baby. He visits the pub to see Eva, who confesses to the crime, but insists on staying to carry out her undercover work. Meanwhile, Jack vows revenge on Callum's murderer, and Heston continues to cause upset at the Mill

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Eva's undercover job comes to a dramatic conclusion when Jack begins to see through her deception. A patient plants a stink bomb in the Campus surgery, and when Michelle meets Heston for the first time she takes the opportunity to inform him of the staff's impression of him

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Connie investigates Dominic's death, and becomes very suspicious of Diane's behaviour - especially when she learns of their past relationship and the medical cause of the fatal accident. Mark tries to make peace with Chrissie, but to no avail, and two student doctors have a disastrous first day on the job, both managing to get on the wrong side of Owen

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Charlotte Salt joins the cast as Sam Nicholls, an ambitious Army medic on secondment. She begins by joining a paramedic crew for the day, but has to rely on her military training when an aggressive driver rams the ambulance off the road. Meanwhile, Noel is keen to increase security after a run-in with an angry patient, but an encounter with a grieving mother changes his mind

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two. Unwitting bank robbers draft in undercover copper Rickman as their getaway driver _ but her involvement provokes an angry reaction from her superiors, who insist she's overstepped the mark and is getting out of control. Suzanne Maddock and Simon Rouse star

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Minty proves himself to Sam by making the ultimate commitment, Vanessa bonds with Abi, and Ian pines after his youth. Meanwhile, Christian finds Syed the perfect job

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Minty seeks solace in Heather, Jane and Ian are shocked when Peter and Lucy are accused of cheating in their exams, and Dot presents Max with a gift that stops him dead

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.sub-title: Killing Me Softly with His Bad Pop Song
programme.desc: The lead singer of a band falls off a roof in an apparent suicide, but Harry's granddaughter Lola is certain it was murder

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: When a communist student is found dead after a run-in with local workers, Blake sifts through the politics and intrigue to find the killer. Crime drama, starring Craig McLachlan

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Part one of two. An ailing American millionaire becomes obsessed with saving the art treasures of a slowly sinking Venice and his granddaughter hires Lovejoy to help in the quest. However, as soon as the roguish dealer arrives, he becomes embroiled in a murder. Drama, starring Ian McShane and Dudley Sutton

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon's growing relationship with boyfriend Colin hits the rocks, threatening her new-found happiness. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Howard has had enough of Pearl and decides to leave home for ever. However, he soon finds he misses her, so the trio try to reunite the couple. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Brian Wilde, with Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy decides to go trekking across the moors, but his adventure coincides with Auntie Wainwright's special offer of grocery delivery bicycles. Comedy, starring Brian Wilde

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Howard is forced to take drastic measures, threatening wife Pearl that he will leave home to join the French Foreign Legion. Long-running comedy, starring Robert Fyfe

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: The British airmen are forced to return to their hideout at Rene's cafe following a bungled escape attempt, and Edith continues to search for a new husband. Gorden Kaye and Carmen Silvera star

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: The British send their finest French-speaking agent to say 'good moaning' to Rene and his colleagues and, dressed as a pantomime cow, the two airmen narrowly avoid being milked before going to a landing field to pick up their plane home

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: While driving a borrowed armoured car, Rene and Captain Geering are mistaken for an ammunition convoy and ambushed by the Resistance, giving Monsieur Alfonse the ideal opportunity to woo Edith. Comedy, starring Gorden Kaye

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: In their first case without trusty colleague Jack, the team members reinvestigate the disappearance of PE teacher Jason Bowe when the remains of a body are discovered near the elite public boarding school where he taught. Unfortunately, their snooping could not have come at a worse time for the staff, who are preparing to welcome a local MP to open their new computer centre - but what they do glean tells them the dead man seemed very much a loner. However, it soon turns out he got on much better with his students, forming close and inappropriate relationships with several. But could his behaviour have rattled someone enough to kill him? Susannah Harker and Nicola Walker guest star

programme.title: Dalziel & Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The duo are called out to a private zoo, where human remains have been found in the tigers' den. The evidence points to an unfortunate accident, but Dalziel suspects foul play - and a connection to a mysterious disappearance he investigated 20 years previously. Detective drama, starring Warren Clarke and Colin Buchanan

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Part one of two. An ailing American millionaire becomes obsessed with saving the art treasures of a slowly sinking Venice and his granddaughter hires Lovejoy to help in the quest. programme.desc: Dorien has a life-changing experience with a psychic, while Tracey takes charge of a boys' football team. Starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.desc: Lieutenant Commander Willoughby takes an instant liking to Compo, Clegg and Foggy and offers them the chance to become extremely wealthy. Ron Moody guest stars

programme.desc: Sandra reopens an investigation into the suspected suicide of a Foreign Office diplomat, whose body was found in a frozen London lake after she had suffered the personal tragedy of a miscarriage and the professional embarrassment of having a government laptop stolen from her home. The woman's fiance and twin sister both believe her death is connected to sensitive information held on the missing computer and blame her boss for her downfall - and when Sandra clashes with the man himself, it only makes her more determined to pursue the conspiracy theory, despite Strickland's advice to tread carefully. Simon Day and Sharon Small guest star

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: The actor and espionage fan reveals the secret places, the people and the tales behind Britain's spy history, beginning with the origins of the British Secret Service

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: The actor examines stories of heroism in the Second World War and explores a world of assassins, saboteurs, commandos, real-life super-villains and the ultimate femmes fatales. David also gets a taste of what it was like to be sent undercover as he takes flight in Britain's last remaining Lysander aircraft - the plane used to get agents in and out of Nazi-occupied Europe

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: From hi-tech intelligence to undercover ops, the actor reveals how masterminds of the Second World War defeated Hitler with their problem-solving

programme.title: Hitler's Supercars
programme.desc: Documentary charting the rise of Nazi Germany's Silver Arrow Grand Prix and speed record cars of the 1930s. Leading motor racing and Second World War experts James Holland, Richard Williams, Eberhard Reuss and Chris Routledge tell the story of the Nazi-funded Auto Union and Mercedes Benz National Racing Cars

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A group of amateur pilots find their light plane has a glorious war record - and launch an ambitious project to rebuild the Piper Cub and restore its military markings

programme.title: Trawlermen

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Ryan tries his hand at offshore fishing on board Ryanwood - one of a pair of the most successful trawlers in Britain. programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist ventures into uncharted territory in pursuit of new discoveries, encountering extraordinary wildlife and meeting remarkable people. To begin, Steve and a team of climbers and jungle survival experts head into the ancient landscape of South America's Guiana Shield. This vast wilderness of pristine forests and towering table-top mountains is one of the most inaccessible terrains on the planet

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist leads an expedition into an unexplored desert canyon in the Jebel Akhdar mountain range of Oman. With temperatures soaring, dehydration and heat stroke are a constant threat

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and a team of kayakers head to the Himalayas to attempt to row down the last great unexplored river in Bhutan. But there's a reason it has never been attempted before - it runs through a steep gorge which, according to legend, drops off the face of the planet

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and his team venture into the heart of Suriname, to kayak an unnamed river that will take them through a forest unchanged for millions of years. programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: The actor examines stories of heroism in the Second World War and explores a world of assassins, saboteurs, commandos, real-life super-villains and the ultimate femmes fatales. David also gets a taste of what it was like to be sent undercover as he takes flight in Britain's last remaining Lysander aircraft - the plane used to get agents in and out of Nazi-occupied Europe

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: From hi-tech intelligence to undercover ops, the actor reveals how masterminds of the Second World War defeated Hitler with their problem-solving

programme.title: Hitler's Supercars
programme.desc: Documentary charting the rise of Nazi Germany's Silver Arrow Grand Prix and speed record cars of the 1930s. Leading motor racing and Second World War experts James Holland, Richard Williams, Eberhard Reuss and Chris Routledge tell the story of the Nazi-funded Auto Union and Mercedes Benz National Racing Cars

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A group of amateur pilots find their light plane has a glorious war record - and launch an ambitious project to rebuild the Piper Cub and restore its military markings

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: At St Athan in Wales, engineer John Sparks and his team of ex-Navy and RAF engineers begin the task of reassembling the Czech-built jet from nine parts delivered by lorry

programme.title: Warbird Workshop

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist ventures into uncharted territory in pursuit of new discoveries, encountering extraordinary wildlife and meeting remarkable people. To begin, Steve and a team of climbers and jungle survival experts head into the ancient landscape of South America's Guiana Shield. This vast wilderness of pristine forests and towering table-top mountains is one of the most inaccessible terrains on the planet

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist leads an expedition into an unexplored desert canyon in the Jebel Akhdar mountain range of Oman. With temperatures soaring, dehydration and heat stroke are a constant threat

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and a team of kayakers head to the Himalayas to attempt to row down the last great unexplored river in Bhutan. But there's a reason it has never been attempted before - it runs through a steep gorge which, according to legend, drops off the face of the planet

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and his team venture into the heart of Suriname, to kayak an unnamed river that will take them through a forest unchanged for millions of years. The region is so remote, it could conceal undiscovered natural wonders - and so it proves as the journey results in a surprise beyond their wildest dreams

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Jimmy considers whether his prawn trawler Amity should ride out a storm or head for port, and the pressure builds on the Ocean Venture skipper as the boat struggles to find haddock. The crew members depend on their catch making a profit, and a haul of cut-price coley will only cover the trip's costs

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Skipper of the Ocean Venture John Buchan takes a huge risk in the deep and treacherous waters of the North Atlantic to find the perfect catch. Following the previous night's storm, the Amity crew faces a further setback, while Fruitful Bough fills its hold and heads for home

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Ryan tries his hand at offshore fishing on board Ryanwood - one of a pair of the most successful trawlers in Britain. However, he is forced to battle seasickness and knows that if he does not knuckle down to work, skipper Kevin West will not be asking him to join them again

programme.title: The World at War

Leroy and Willis meet Beth and Ruby with a view to going on a date, but Willis is worried that Ruby's not right for him. programme.sub-title: Three Men, a Woman and a Baby
programme.desc: Rodney and Albert begin to worry the flat will get overcrowded as the birth of Del-Boy Jr approaches, while Del feels well prepared for fatherhood thanks to a stint at antenatal classes with Raquel. Starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy enters the import trade after striking a deal with Boycie to fetch a consignment of dodgy diamonds across from Holland, and ropes in Rodney and Uncle Albert to help. Their plans are jeopardised when old foe Chief Inspector Slater picks up the Trotters' trail. Feature-length episode of the comedy, guest starring Jim Broadbent, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Alma's Not Normal
programme.desc: There's some good news for Lin as the hospital staff inform her that her section could finally be lifted, although this is dependent on her either moving into a hostel or in with a family member. As Alma is finally getting her life back on track and the hostel isn't exactly the right place for a recovering addict, Alma has to convince her grandma to let Lin move in with her - but will this be a step too far for Lin and Joan?

DCI Haines and DS Selforth build their case, leading to a near miss with the two youngest outlaws

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: The spooks' thoughtless behaviour sends Alison into meltdown, prompting them to come up with a creative way to get back into her good books and show her how truly sorry they are. Mary however, believing she has done nothing wrong, refuses to take any responsibility, not after the fiery fate that befell her the last time she took the blame for something she didn't do. Alison and Mike have a last-minute cancellation for the guesthouse and decide that a relaxing day off is exactly what they need. programme.title: Not Going Out

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: Frank begrudgingly accompanies Margaret on a visit to his ex-wife, revealing to his daughter a side she never knew existed. Greg continues to downplay his chances with Anne-Marie, forcing Gabby to commence Operation Greg 2.0. Diane sniffs a lead before going on an unlikely date. John meets a cook, and tries crack. DCI Haines and DS Selforth build their case, leading to a near miss with the two youngest outlaws

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: The spooks' thoughtless behaviour sends Alison into meltdown, prompting them to come up with a creative way to get back into her good books and show her how truly sorry they are. Mary however, believing she has done nothing wrong, refuses to take any responsibility, not after the fiery fate that befell her the last time she took the blame for something she didn't do. Alison and Mike have a last-minute cancellation for the guesthouse and decide that a relaxing day off is exactly what they need. Comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: Ghosts

Another bombshell drops when Mike realises there have been some crossed wires over an event booking and he and Alison are forced into hosting an impromptu - and ill-prepared - children's birthday bash in order not to let two little girls down. Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dorothy welcomes Gary's suggestion of an open relationship, while Dermot continues to woo Deborah

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Piers travels to Gadsden Correctional Facility near Tallahassee in Florida, where he hears the story of Ashley Humphrey. As a 20-year-old in 2003, she pumped eight bullets into barmaid Sandee Rozzo - a crime for which she is now serving 25 years. Piers tries to understand how she came to commit the crime, wondering whether she was persuaded by her domineering and abusive husband - who was being accused of rape by the victim - or if she is simply a cold-blooded killer who came up with the plan herself

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster meets Florida woman Jennifer Mee who, as a teenager, became a media sensation when she suffered a particularly strange ailment - a persistent case of hiccups. But in 2010, she lured a man to a dark alleyway where her friends were waiting to rob him. Instead he ended up being shot dead. Even though she didn't pull the trigger, and was nowhere near when the bullets were fired, Jennifer was sentenced to life without parole. Piers charts the journey through fame and rejection that saw Jennifer descend into a criminal lifestyle, and asks family members and legal experts if they believe her punishment was too harsh

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A circus wife with an overworked sword-swallowing husband trades places with an overwhelmed mother of four rambunctious boys with an antique-addicted spouse

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis meets the Oscar-winning actress at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre, her life away from acting and her relationship with her husband, the late Michael Williams. Louis also accompanies Judi to the Gielgud Theatre in London's West End, where they discuss the difficulties of the lockdown and how it inadvertently led to her surprise popularity on TikTok

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Jo and Ash deal with a patient whose chronic cough leaves him struggling to breathe, while Joel and Nic treat a man who's fallen from a ladder while wielding a hedge trimmer

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Janine and Adam assist a woman who is threatening to jump out of a first-floor window, and husband and wife team Ann and Kevin are called out to help Ann's sick Dad

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver returns to present the contestants with two difficult challenges: a 15-minute meal and his mushroom and spinach rotolo

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team transforms a home in Bolton, Greater Manchester for the Taylor-Mann family, making the house more suitable for nine-year-old William, who has severe autism. Williams's condition means that he is extremely hypersensitive to noise, and being in close proximity to his siblings is often just too much for him to bear. Nick Knowles and the team, with the help of kind volunteers, transform the property to create a quiet, calm space that can help William feel as comfortable as possible

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team create a safe and inspiring home space for the Newcombes, who have a two-year-old son with a very rare lung condition. Trailing breathing tubes, equipment the size of tumble dryers, and no downstairs bathroom have turned their once safe home into a risky space for the family. Nick and the team have amassed a huge group of volunteers for Arlo and the family, as they set to work creating a safe and inspiring space that Arlo and his family can call home

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles hits the road to catch up with some of the inspirational people and communities the show has helped in its 20-year history. On his travels across the length and breadth of the country, Nick returns to some of the series' biggest and most challenging builds, including Canada Street in Manchester, The Yard in Edinburgh, and DIY SOS's most logistically-difficult and longest build - the construction of the Grenfell Community Centre and Dale Youth Boxing club

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Four-year-old pug and beagle cross Barney is brought into Fitzpatrick Referrals after being hit by a bus. The dog has lost 40 per cent of the bone in the damaged leg, so Noel creates an innovative two-tier treatment, involving an external ankle frame for support. Sisters Rosemary and Diane bring in their five-year-old basset hound Albert when they find he is suddenly unable to move his back legs, and 10-month-old Labrador cross Gylly receives treatment for lameness and an unusual bone deformity

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Golden retriever poodle-cross Suki's front legs have developed abnormally and now require urgent attention as the bones of her forearms are growing at different rates, so Noel decides that major surgery is required. Beloved elderly Labrador Raffa is nearly 11 and has become lame with constant pain in his front legs, and Noel discovers cartilage erosion in both elbows. Meanwhile, five-year-old dachshund Zizi is rushed in after suddenly losing the use of her back legs overnight, and an urgent MRI scan confirms that Zizi has suffered an exploded disc

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team transforms a home in Bolton, Greater Manchester for the Taylor-Mann family, making the house more suitable for nine-year-old William, who has severe autism. Williams's condition means that he is extremely hypersensitive to noise, and being in close proximity to his siblings is often just too much for him to bear. Nick Knowles and the team, with the help of kind volunteers, transform the property to create a quiet, calm space that can help William feel as comfortable as possible

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team create a safe and inspiring home space for the Newcombes, who have a two-year-old son with a very rare lung condition. Nick and the team have amassed a huge group of volunteers for Arlo and the family, as they set to work creating a safe and inspiring space that Arlo and his family can call home

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.sub-title: Hugo and the Ice Cream Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets some newborn pups fighting to survive, and helps teach Hugo, a Cane Corso rescued from quarantine at Dover, how to be a dog

programme.title: Untold: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: Shocking revelations about Shannon's abduction are laid bare. Instead of feeling relief at her rescue, the community realises something is very wrong

programme.title: Psychopath with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: In 2007, when Paris Bennett was 13 years old, stabbed his four-year-old sister to death, a crime for which he has been behind bars ever since. Now 25 and in his first interview on British television, he tells Piers Morgan how this was no impulsive fit of rage but rather a cold, deliberate act planned as an act of revenge against his mother Charity - who is watching the interview unfold in a nearby room. She has stood by him even though she fears that when he gets out, he could still harbour violent intentions towards her - or even worse, towards his younger brother

programme.title: Women Behind Bars with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: Part one of two. The veteran broadcaster follows life inside two prisons holding some of America's most notorious female criminals - Indiana Women's Prison and Rockville Correctional Facility in the same US state. Among the inmates he meets in the first edition are Sarah Pender, who went on the run while serving 110 years for double murder, before being captured four months later, and Martha Search, who is looking forward to getting to grips with modern technology when her 20-year sentence comes to an end

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster travels to Bedford Hills Correctional Facility in New York State to meet Sheila Davalloo, who has been convicted for murdering Anna Lisa Raymundo. However, in a bizarre twist to the story, Sheila has not yet started her 50-year sentence. First she must finish the 25 years she was given for the attempted murder of her husband. Sheila has remained silent about the killing for 14 years, so Piers tries to get her to finally open up, while also looking into why she wanted both of her victims out of the way

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: An active mum from a tight-knit pro wrestling family trades places with a mother-of-three whose husband prefers playing video games to spending time with his family

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis spends time with Dominic Harrison - aka singer and musician Yungblud - as he joins him during his whirlwind tour. Along the way, Louis meets fans who follow Yungblud with almost religious intensity, before sitting down with the singer to discuss a range of topics including his mental health, his sexuality and his response to outspoken critics

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Today in Stoke, paramedics Mick and Rachel help a young man who has hurt his back. In Dudley, paramedics help a 74-year-old who had a shock from his internal defibrillator

programme.title: Women Behind Bars with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: Part two of two. The veteran broadcaster meets more inmates inside two of Indiana's most dangerous women's prisons. Among them are Dawn Hopkins, who was sentenced to life for murdering her three-month-old son, and Sarah 'Cindy' White, who was incarcerated as a teenager and will spend the rest of her life behind bars. The journalist also hears the remarkable story of Linda Darby who, after escaping from jail in 1972, spent the next 35 years on the run - before the law finally caught up with her

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster travels to Bedford Hills Correctional Facility in New York State to meet Sheila Davalloo, who has been convicted for murdering Anna Lisa Raymundo. However, in a bizarre twist to the story, Sheila has not yet started her 50-year sentence. First she must finish the 25 years she was given for the attempted murder of her husband. Sheila has remained silent about the killing for 14 years, so Piers tries to get her to finally open up, while also looking into why she wanted both of her victims out of the way

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A circus wife with an overworked sword-swallowing husband trades places with an overwhelmed mother of four rambunctious boys with an antique-addicted spouse

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis meets the Oscar-winning actress at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre, her life away from acting and her relationship with her husband, the late Michael Williams. Louis also accompanies Judi to the Gielgud Theatre in London's West End, where they discuss the difficulties of the lockdown and how it inadvertently led to her surprise popularity on TikTok

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Jo and Ash deal with a patient whose chronic cough leaves him struggling to breathe, while Joel and Nic treat a man who's fallen from a ladder while wielding a hedge trimmer

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Janine and Adam assist a woman who is threatening to jump out of a first-floor window, and husband and wife team Ann and Kevin are called out to help Ann's sick Dad

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver returns to present the contestants with two difficult challenges: a 15-minute meal and his mushroom and spinach rotolo

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team transforms a home in Bolton, Greater Manchester for the Taylor-Mann family, making the house more suitable for nine-year-old William, who has severe autism. Williams's condition means that he is extremely hypersensitive to noise, and being in close proximity to his siblings is often just too much for him to bear. Nick Knowles and the team, with the help of kind volunteers, transform the property to create a quiet, calm space that can help William feel as comfortable as possible

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team create a safe and inspiring home space for the Newcombes, who have a two-year-old son with a very rare lung condition. Trailing breathing tubes, equipment the size of tumble dryers, and no downstairs bathroom have turned their once safe home into a risky space for the family. Nick and the team have amassed a huge group of volunteers for Arlo and the family, as they set to work creating a safe and inspiring space that Arlo and his family can call home

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles hits the road to catch up with some of the inspirational people and communities the show has helped in its 20-year history. On his travels across the length and breadth of the country, Nick returns to some of the series' biggest and most challenging builds, including Canada Street in Manchester, The Yard in Edinburgh, and DIY SOS's most logistically-difficult and longest build - the construction of the Grenfell Community Centre and Dale Youth Boxing club

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Four-year-old pug and beagle cross Barney is brought into Fitzpatrick Referrals after being hit by a bus. The dog has lost 40 per cent of the bone in the damaged leg, so Noel creates an innovative two-tier treatment, involving an external ankle frame for support. Sisters Rosemary and Diane bring in their five-year-old basset hound Albert when they find he is suddenly unable to move his back legs, and 10-month-old Labrador cross Gylly receives treatment for lameness and an unusual bone deformity

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Golden retriever poodle-cross Suki's front legs have developed abnormally and now require urgent attention as the bones of her forearms are growing at different rates, so Noel decides that major surgery is required. Beloved elderly Labrador Raffa is nearly 11 and has become lame with constant pain in his front legs, and Noel discovers cartilage erosion in both elbows. Meanwhile, five-year-old dachshund Zizi is rushed in after suddenly losing the use of her back legs overnight, and an urgent MRI scan confirms that Zizi has suffered an exploded disc

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team transforms a home in Bolton, Greater Manchester for the Taylor-Mann family, making the house more suitable for nine-year-old William, who has severe autism. programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.sub-title: Hugo and the Ice Cream Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets some newborn pups fighting to survive, and helps teach Hugo, a Cane Corso rescued from quarantine at Dover, how to be a dog

programme.title: Untold: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: Shocking revelations about Shannon's abduction are laid bare. Instead of feeling relief at her rescue, the community realises something is very wrong

programme.title: Psychopath with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: In 2007, when Paris Bennett was 13 years old, stabbed his four-year-old sister to death, a crime for which he has been behind bars ever since. Now 25 and in his first interview on British television, he tells Piers Morgan how this was no impulsive fit of rage but rather a cold, deliberate act planned as an act of revenge against his mother Charity - who is watching the interview unfold in a nearby room. She has stood by him even though she fears that when he gets out, he could still harbour violent intentions towards her - or even worse, towards his younger brother

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Piers travels to Gadsden Correctional Facility near Tallahassee in Florida, where he hears the story of Ashley Humphrey. As a 20-year-old in 2003, she pumped eight bullets into barmaid Sandee Rozzo - a crime for which she is now serving 25 years. Piers tries to understand how she came to commit the crime, wondering whether she was persuaded by her domineering and abusive husband - who was being accused of rape by the victim - or if she is simply a cold-blooded killer who came up with the plan herself

programme.title: Women Behind Bars with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: Part two of two. The veteran broadcaster meets more inmates inside two of Indiana's most dangerous women's prisons. The journalist also hears the remarkable story of Linda Darby who, after escaping from jail in 1972, spent the next 35 years on the run - before the law finally caught up with her

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: An active mum from a tight-knit pro wrestling family trades places with a mother-of-three whose husband prefers playing video games to spending time with his family

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis spends time with Dominic Harrison - aka singer and musician Yungblud - as he joins him during his whirlwind tour. Along the way, Louis meets fans who follow Yungblud with almost religious intensity, before sitting down with the singer to discuss a range of topics including his mental health, his sexuality and his response to outspoken critics

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Women Behind Bars with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: Part one of two. The veteran broadcaster follows life inside two prisons holding some of America's most notorious female criminals - Indiana Women's Prison and Rockville Correctional Facility in the same US state. Among the inmates he meets in the first edition are Sarah Pender, who went on the run while serving 110 years for double murder, before being captured four months later, and Martha Search, who is looking forward to getting to grips with modern technology when her 20-year sentence comes to an end

programme.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy v Rooney
programme.desc: With access to key individuals who didn't give evidence at the trial, this documentary explores the hidden workings of the tabloids, PRs and agents connected to so-called 'Wagatha Christie', which followed accuisations between footballers' wives Coleen Rooney and Rebekah Vardy. Contributors include Colin Paterson and Lizzie Cundy

programme.desc: Four cooks vie for the chance to sit out Sunday's elimination. In the first round, contestants must produce a dish using the ingredients found in mentor Shannon Bennett's fridge

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek has three scooters to collect, while also finding room for a Daimler and a teardrop caravan

programme.title: Classic Car Kings
programme.desc: Irv takes on the restoration of an Escort RS1600i from an owner who had to give it up due to ill health, but it turns out to be a much bigger job than he imagined

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Henry Cole visit a motorbike fan, making table lamps from engines and turning a pallet and iron wheels into a stylish modern coffee table

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: In the second programme, the historian explores how science and detection influenced the popular culture of murder during Victorian times. Writers including Charles Dickens and Wilkie Collins were fascinated by grisly crimes, and the literary genre that came out of it captured the imagination of readers. The presenter also reveals that when Jack the Ripper began his reign of terror in London at the same time Robert Louis Stevenson's Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde was published, the idea of the serial killer was introduced to the British public

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty
programme.desc: The story of Royal Navy aircraft carrier HMS Queen Elizabeth's first operational mission, following it on a gruelling seven-month voyage to the South China Sea. On board is a company of 1,600 men and women, including 300 US Marines and aviators, with the deployment to the other side of an increasingly-troubled world aiming to be a demonstration of Britain's new naval strength to friends and foes alike

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty
programme.desc: On its way to the far Pacific, HMS Queen Elizabeth ventures into the eastern Mediterranean. Britain's biggest warship is exercising its rights of navigation in international waters, but almost immediately Russian warships are diverted from the Black Sea to intercept it, while. Russian fighter bombers are also scrambled from their base in Syria to buzz the British task force and a tense stand-off unfolds

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave gets a nasty surprise when he opens the bonnet of a fast Ford from the 80s, and an Austin Heavy 12 nearly a century old sets off a bidding war at the auction

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek, with help from the Mathewson clan, drags a mini pickup out of the barn where it's been for 20 years, and a 350cc Douglas Mark V motorbike from 1950 goes under the hammer

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Rob Bell looks at how the greatest invasion in human history was being prepared in Southern England and the buildings that helped with D-Day and Operation Overlord

programme.title: World War Two from Above
programme.desc: Experts uncover a WWII German trench system revealing a daring commando raid to capture it. And, the sunken remains of a tank show how dangerous preparations for D-Day were

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team values rarities at Bletchley Park near Milton Keynes, home of the Enigma code-breakers of the Second World War. Objects under scrutiny include an ornate vase that nearly ended up in the dishwasher, a teddy bear with a secret story and an art deco brooch that leaves the evaluators in awe. Presented by Fiona Bruce

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit Burghley House, near Stamford in Lincolnshire, where objects receiving valuations include a rare medal awarded to a heroic pigeon, a model ship made by Napoleonic prisoners of war, a Lalique figure originally purchased in a junk shop for less than £1, and a surprisingly valuable collection of boxes

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There's an unlikely arrival at the North Yorkshire car auction - an Argentinian Army Mercedes G wagon that saw action in the Falklands War

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek has three scooters to collect, while also finding room for a Daimler and a teardrop caravan

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater Robbie Cumming begins a 170-mile journey across the north of England. However, he soon runs into difficulty when he encounters a propeller problem in Wigan and runs aground in Blackburn. Nevertheless, he pushes on to navigate a true wonder of the waterways, the Burnley Embankment

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater and film-maker Robbie Cumming crosses the Pennines on the picturesque Leeds and Liverpool Canal, and lends a hand to hire boaters in Gargrave, North Yorkshire. He also encounters Bingley Five Rise Locks, a wonder of the inland waterways

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: On the way to pick up two lovely '70s Lotus sports cars, Derek takes to the skies for his first ever helicopter flight in a 1967 Bell 47 chopper

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: This week tells the tale of the two Mercs, but what will the moral of the story be? Plus, the team get stuck into a moddable favourite - a 2006 Ford Fiesta ST

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There's an unlikely arrival at the North Yorkshire car auction - an Argentinian Army Mercedes G wagon that saw action in the Falklands War

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Over the years Derek has learnt to always expect the unexpected. So when Call the Midwife star Cliff Parisi drops off his Bedford CA campervan it's just another day at the office

programme.title: Classic Car Kings

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty
programme.desc: Following a welcome break in Cyprus, HMS Queen Elizabeth heads back to sea, but after passing through the Suez Canal it's discovered that one sailor has contracted Covid-19 while on shore leave. A week later, as the ship enters the Indian Ocean, the vurus has spread almost out of control with 400 sailors now in isolation - either because they are infected or are close contacts with those who have tested positive. With almost a third of the ship's labour force out of commission, command has to find ways of keeping the aircraft carrier operational

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty
programme.desc: HMS Queen Elizabeth continues her journey to the South China Sea, but rampant Covid on board means she is not allowed to come ashore for any of the planned port visits. Sailing past Singapore and Hong Kong, the ship has become a floating prison, isolated on the high seas. Her dedicated supply ships do their best to keep the Queen Elizabeth topped up with food, fuel and ammunition. As the QE and her escorting destroyers and frigates enter the contested and potentially dangerous waters of the South China Sea, the Chinese Navy react by probing her with submarines and surface warships. Anti-submarine helicopters launch continually in order to identify, track and see off the subsurface threat

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: The historian investigates the complex factors that shaped the dark imagination of a refined Devonshire lady, discovering family secrets and a childhood haunted by a sinister figure.
